title: Flung into a New World? Time to Lift the 200-Year Curse!
titleRomaji: Isekai ni Otosareta... Jouka wa Kihon! @COMIC
titleEnglish: Flung into a New World? Time to Lift the 200-Year Curse!
titleNative: 異世界に落とされた…浄化は基本！＠COMIC
synonyms: Summoned to Another World... Purification Is basic!
synopsis: Akira Tennou, an unremarkable thirty-five-year-old man, gets hit by a truck on his way home from work and, after a brief experience in some mystical limbo, wakes up in a gloomy forest. This forest is beset by a sinister black mist—his memories of his little sister's lectures about fantasy novels tell him that it's probably under an evil curse. He soon encounters one of the forest's residents: an enormous silver wolf. At first the creature is hostile, but he finds that it's been corrupted by the same black mist, and he only needs to cry "Purify!" to banish the curse and heal the wolf. Akira discovers that the residents of the forest are all animals, and once purified, they are far from feral beasts. His newfound magic allows him to speak to his new animal companions; he finds that they are intelligent and the rightful rulers of the forest. Akira decides to explore this new world, purifying the land and its inhabitants as he goes. But the source of the cursed mist can't be far away... (Source: J-Novel Club)

synopsis: The Demon Lord is defeated... and the world is at peace. But... he didn't make it in time....... Albus the Hero is in a hurry. The story starts over, and everything goes back, as it should, to where it all began. Time is of the essence in the repeating adventures of Albus the Hero, who remembers it all. Time is limited! Efficient strategy is key! When you recruit a priest to join your party, you have to be forceful! You don't want him to take things the wrong way. And before you know it, you'll be facing that dangerous S-class demon. Albus the Hero will finally claim his desired future in this ultra-fast real-time attack fantasy adventure! (Source: Sunday Webry, translated)

title: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleEnglish: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleNative: 社長と酒と星
synopsis: At 24, Reina Izutsu has recently become the new president of Izutsu Printing after taking over for her late father. Young and not quite experienced, Reina wants to do her best but unfortunately comes across as harsh with her employees. Stressed and feeling lost, Reina spends an evening drowning her sorrows in beer at an empty park. She rants and vents out loud to the starry sky that she wants to give up and quit being president, just letting off steam. Except, she fails to realize that her subordinate, 37-year-old section chief Kenichi Ishizumi, heard her drunken ramblings! But rather than use this against her, Kenichi finds himself charmed by the young woman. He vows then and there to support her and help her find her way as company president, no matter what! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Kimi no Yokogao shika Mirenai
titleNative: 君の横顔しか見れない
synonyms: I Can Only See Your Side Profile
synopsis: The popular Fujimori Sachi never faces Kishimoto Arata, who sits next to her in class. No matter how hard Kishimoto tries to see her face, she brilliantly turns away from him. As a result, he has only ever seen her side profile. But she talks to him normally otherwise. This mysterious girl seems to have a secret...? A cute school romantic comedy about a girl who only shows her side profile VS a boy who won't give up ♪ Originally a web manga released on the author's Twitter account since May 7, 2019. Official serialization began in Comic Gene on August 16, 2020.

title: My BFF is a Tyrant in Training
titleEnglish: My BFF is a Tyrant in Training
titleNative: 소꿉친구를 폭군으로 키웠습니다
synonyms: I Raised My Childhood Friend as a Tyrant
ฉันเลี้ยงเพื่อนสมัยเด็กให้กลายเป็นทรราช
J’ai élevé mon ami d’enfance comme un tyran
synopsis: A young Korean woman is reincarnated inside a novel as Viche Amelian, who according to the story, is to be executed in place of the young prince Jade for assassinating the emperor. After facing her death, she expects to get her old life back, but instead wakes up as a 10-year-old Viche! Could it be that her death failed to turn Jade into a tyrant, as the story foretold? Viche must now figure out where she went wrong, and make sure that this time, Jade becomes the world’s most wicked tyrant! (Source: Tapas) Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: Wicked Spot
titleNative: ウィキッドスポット
synopsis: After spending over a century hiding in the shadows, powerful sorceress Sadako stumbles upon the dazzling world of social media and decides to post her way into her first real contact with humanity. She soon becomes an internet sensation, attracting a huge following of doting fans—and shocks them all by announcing she is a witch. The big reveal turns one follower called Hanako, a lonely young woman with seemingly inhuman strength and a curious resistance to magic, into a dedicated hater, and inadvertently sends them both on a whirlwind adventure beyond their wildest dreams! (Source: Kodansha USA)

Years later, in modern-day Japan, the apprentice finally tracks her down—only to find that the once-powerful witch is now a gloomy, apathetic woman who spends her days smoking by the window. What follows is a laid-back, offbeat comedy about the clash between a responsible apprentice and her completely unmotivated mentor. (Source: Natalie, translated)

titleNative: 全职高手
synopsis: No one could ever come close to “Battle God” Ye Qiu’s skills in Glory, a popular game that took the world by storm. His path to redemption, filled with strategy and memories, marks his thrilling return to the summit. (Source: Tapas)

title: How to Love a Loser
titleNative: ダメ人間の愛しかた
synonyms: How to Love a Useless Person
synopsis: Shinba has no talent, no job, no money...he's a complete loser. However, he has a girlfriend, Hizumi who is beautiful, smart, good at her work. He has no idea why she says she likes him. He's almost scared, but loves Hizumi so much...he asks Hizumi, "Why do you want to date with someone like me?" She answers..."You always oversleep, talk about some video games I don't even know about, sing lame songs no one knows at karaoke, gave me a toy ring as a gift. Your face is always gloomy as hell. But...looking at such face makes me happy, Shinba. I love you, ha ha." Is she telling the truth? Hizumi must have some kind of a secret, Shinba thinks. He wants to find out...but maybe he shouldn't. (Source: BookWalker)

synopsis: A pocket-sized cat-human: have you met a Nuko? In a world where these curious creatures evolved from ordinary cats, part-timer Yuya finds two abandoned nukos on the side of the road and brings them home out of the rain. Kei needs his ducks to be in a row, while Sasame charms everyone she meets. Yuya’s got the cooking and sewing skills to take care of these adorable new housemates, but when he’s the one falling asleep in any warm spot of sunlight, who’s really taking care of who?! Kick back and let this human, his nukos, and their ameowsing life warm your heart! Included chapters: 24.5 (Source: One Peace Books)

titleEnglish: I... Don't Want to Work Anymore. I Quit Being an Adventurer For Good and You Can't Stop Me.
titleNative: 『もう‥‥働きたくないんです』冒険者なんか辞めてやる。今更、待遇を変えるからとお願いされてもお断りです。僕はぜーったい働きません。
synonyms: “I… Don’t Want To Work Anymore” I Quit Being An Adventurer. Even If You Treat Me Better Now, I Won’t Do It. I Will Never Work Again.
＂이제… 일하고 싶지 않습니다＂ 모험가 따위 그만두겠습니다． 이제 와서 잘해줄 테니 돌아오라고 해도 거절합니다． 저는 절―대 일하지 않습니다．
synopsis: Ex, an E-rank adventurer, makes a decision one day after five years of slaving away at the guild. "I'm quitting this job!" Ex was belittled for only being able to use beginner magic, but as it turns out, it had a special trait... Even if people threaten him or ask him to do anything, it's too late for them. "I'm neeeever gonna work anymore!" (Source: Manga UP!)

title: Mechanical Marie
titleNative: 機械じかけのマリー
synonyms: Mechanical Marie – Mein Hausmädchen ist (k)ein Roboter!
synopsis: He was a boy. She was a robot. Well...not really. In all actuality, Marie is completely, totally, 100 percent human, but because her strange new employer seemingly despises humans, the powers-that-be are paying a handsome sum for her to pretend she's the latest and greatest android while protecting said eccentric master from the seemingly endless attempts on his life. Which is fine, but they forgot to mention one tiny seemingly insignificant detail-this dude absolutely dotes on inanimate objects like Marie can't believe. She's not sure what will kill her first, the assassins or his affections...? (Source: Yen Press) Note: Began as a one-shot published in the May 2020 issue of LaLa on March 24, 2020. A three-chapter series ran from the August to October 2020 issues. They were collected and released as Volume 1, as the extended serialization continued in the January 2021 issue of LaLa on November 24, 2020. Chapter count includes three special chapters.

synopsis: Sana is the hardworking daughter of a shop owner, and she often ventures out into the forest to gather the herbs needed for the restorative potions they sell. But on one trip, she happens to pick up a mysterious strategy guide for a game—and it's filled with detailed information about her town, those around her, and even what's yet to come! Except, the future may not be at all what she expects… With such a powerful—and dangerous—book in hand, what will Sana do? (Source: Yen Press)

title: The Knight in the Area
titleNative: エリアの騎士
synopsis: Believing himself to be useless at football, Aizawa Kakeru opts to become the manager of his school's football team, while his brother Suguru is its ace, and is even good enough to represent Japan. However, Kakeru may be harbouring a strong talent within himself that only Suguru can see, and the two often get into arguments over Kakeru's denial of his skills. Things are made more complicated with the return of Nana, an old playmate of theirs that Kakeru has a crush on. Join the brothers in their journey to the national and even international championships! Story written under the penname Igano, Hiroaki.

titleNative: アイドル辞めるけど結婚してくれますか!?
synonyms: Will You Marry Me If I Quit Being an Idol?
Will You Marry Me Because I Quit Being an Idol?
synopsis: Sato Itto is an ordinary salaryman who has been shy about love due to past trauma. One day, a school reunion is held for the first time in several years. While they are having a good time talking about the good old days, Hebo, a recently retired idol, suddenly shows up! Sato is upset to see Hebo, who was his first love in school. He tries to get over his feelings with the help of alcohol, even though he doesn't normally drink. But when he wakes up the next morning, he finds himself naked in the same bed with Hebo. As Sato desperately tries to recall what happened, Hebo-san shocked him even more by saying... "Marry me!" What will happen to this marriage between two people are absolute zeros at love? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

titleNative: 屋根の下のアルテミス
synopsis: A prodigy of science and a solitary genius—yet terrible at so many things!? When the poor university student Sanosuke Saraki started at a new part-time job at his old high school, he unexpectedly reunites with Koharu Kobachi, a classmate that he admired as a brilliant genius. However, this supposed genius is now a "5th year high school student" who must repeat her senior year for the second time…! Saraki's mission is to "help Koharu graduate by the end of the year." A coming-of-age story about starting over with a 20-year-old high school student!

synopsis: With his brash personality and muscular physique, and his fierce presence fighting against his country's foes, Salyu is known as the “Winter Bear of Tidros." Until one day when he finds himself engaged to Citron, a young lady whose betrothal was broken off in a neighboring country! Starting with a kiss on the forehead, he fidgets awkwardly around this unfamiliar woman. Her smile makes his heart race, and glimpses of her cleavage leave him flustered. Salyu's mind runs wild with naughty thoughts, pushing his sanity to the brink! This chaotic, heart-pounding romantic fantasy comedy begins — with his inner thoughts coming through loud and clear! (Source: Comic Pash, translated)

titleNative: ロックは淑女の嗜みでして
synonyms: Rock wa Shukujo no Tashinami de shite
synopsis: When her mother marries into high society, Lilisa Suzunomiya is forced to leave her commoner ways behind. Now enrolled at an elite all-girls academy, she’s expected to smile politely, sip tea, and hang up her beloved guitar for (ugh…) a violin. But when she hears drums echoing from the old school building, Lilisa is dragged into a jam session with the secretly rebellious young lady Otoha Kurogane, and her passion for music is reignited! High society better watch out—the academy’s most demure maidens are teaming up to form an elegant rock band the likes of which the world has never seen! (Source: Yen Press)

title: Fushi no Kami: Rebuilding Civilization Starts With a Village

titleEnglish: Fushi no Kami: Rebuilding Civilization Starts With a Village
titleNative: フシノカミ～辺境から始める文明再生記～
synopsis: When the civilizations of yesteryear fade from memory and become fanciful fantasy, the only evidence of their existence...are books. Ash, a young boy living in a remote farming village, holds a secret—he possesses memories of a distant and more bountiful past life. Days of toiling in the fields have given rise to a burning desire: to bring more enjoyment to the everyday doldrum of his dreary present day! And while books may be the answer, Ash...can’t actually read! But where there is a will, there is a way. Join Ash as he battles illiteracy and sets his sights on a better life! (Source: J-Novel Club)

synopsis: “I’M REALLY HAPPY TO HEAR THE GIRL I LIKE MISSED ME” Konoha Satou has a dark history. After all, she spent her teen years writing self-indulgent fantasy romance fics-like her Dark History. But since she’s become its most despicable villainess, remembering every last detail is now a matter of life-and-death. Having avoided the first couple of death flags, Satou’s suddenly left in the dark when a mysterious stranger returns from the Lily Kingdom-a character she doesn’t recall writing in the original script. Although Yomi claims to be her ally, can Satou really trust a character she knows nothing about in such a dangerous world? (Source: Yen Press)

title: Sacchi Sarenai Rule Breaker
titleNative: 察知されない最強職 (ルール・ブレイカー)
synonyms: The Undetectable Strongest Job: Rule Breaker
synopsis: By some ill fortune, Hikaru died in a traffic accident. He was in heaven standing in line, waiting to be judged, when he took an unexpected request to transfer his soul into a person in another world. He received an ability called Soul Board which he could use to allocate points to Skills to make himself more powerful. But there was a catch… "I want you to take revenge on someone for me within an hour. If you don’t, I’ll destroy your soul." To pull off the task assigned to him, he poured all his available points to the Stealth skill tree. This is a story of a boy who specialised in Stealth. With his skill trees as weapons, he would demonstrate his unrivalled strength in another world.

title: Excel Saga
titleNative: エクセル・サーガ
synopsis: Earnest young girls Excel and Hyatt (both codenames) hold down minimum-wage jobs to support their true avocation: trying to conquer the city of Fukuoka for the secret organization ACROSS and its dreamy dictator, Il Palazzo--a man whose dignity is such that he could never acknowledge that ACROSS consists of himself, a leaky basement, two unpaid teenage interns, and a stray dog. But society is all to blame, as creator Rikdo Koshi takes aim at everything from organized religion to public television, in a manga that makes reindeer spit blood and puts puppies on the dinner menu. (Source: VIZ Media) Note: Includes 10 extra chapters.

synopsis: Haise is a young boy who has been gifted with an unknown ability. He becomes an adventurer together with his childhood friend Sasha, but is kicked out of the team for being unable to use his ability and being a hindrance. Furthermore, while continuing his solo adventure, he is caught in a trap and falls into dire straits. Just as he is on the brink of death, Haise's ability "Weapon Master" awakens! It is a power that shakes the laws of the world, summoning weapons from another world!? An unrivaled fantasy set in another world that begins with adversity! (Source: SB Creative, translated)

synonyms: What Was I Meant to Call This Mess That Wouldn't Go Away?
synopsis: This world is filthy… Nakayama, a high school boy with an extreme case of germophobia, avoids all social interaction and tries to enjoy his private time alone in a perfectly clean space. But his peaceful days are constantly disrupted by Nishino-san, the cheerful and unpredictable girl who ends up sitting next to him. "Don’t pollute my sanctuary! Don’t intrude on my time!" Contrary to his wishes, day after day, Nakayama is at Nishino's mercy in this chatty rom-com about a germophobe and an unsophisticated high school girl!! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

titleRomaji: Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka? Isogashii desu ka? Sukutte Moratte Ii desu ka?
titleNative: 終末なにしてますか? 忙しいですか? 救ってもらっていいですか?
synopsis: Five hundred years have passed since humanity went extinct at the hands of the fearsome "Beasts." Even up in the sky, where the surviving races dwell on floating islands, these monstrosities constantly threaten to bring death and destruction. Only a small group of young girls, the Leprechauns, can wield the ancient weapons needed to defeat these creatures. Into the girls' unstable and fleeting lives, where a call to certain death could come at any moment, enters an unlikely character: a young man who lost everything five hundred years ago, the last living human awakened from a long, icy slumber...

Thus begins the "Revelation" of the untold side of Record of Ragnarok!

synopsis: Movie otaku Meguru Kanae had potential love interests in elementary, junior high, and high school, but he never made a move due to his lack of experience in love. Disillusioned by his past experience, he vows to devote all his energy to the Movie Club at university and forgo romance altogether. However, his resolution is short-lived, as he falls in love with Sora Ootsuka as soon as he walks into Movie Club. This is the start of a romantic comedy that will sweep all the love flags away! (Source: Magapoke, translated)

titleNative: 桃草さんがものぐさすぎる!!
synopsis: Souji Hataki is an ordinary high school boy who has just landed the perfect new part-time job as a housekeeper for the house of Momogusa. What’s so significant about that? It just so happens to be the home of the most beautiful girl in school! Perfect, pretty, and popular, Momogusa-san is amazing at everything she does and now Hataki will have a chance to see her in her element. But, he quickly learns something shocking: Momogusa is incredibly lazy at home! The moment she’s home from school, she seems to transform into a totally different version of herself and even expects to be pampered! Somehow she grows fond of Hataki and even begins to let him pamper her. Could this be the start of some sort of relationship or is Hataki just a glorified manservant? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Disappearance Diary
titleNative: 失踪日記
synonyms: The Great Escape of the Comic Book Writer
synopsis: In 1989, comic artist Hideo Azuma succumbs to the pressures of deadlines and tries (unsuccessfully) to hang himself using the slope of a mountain. He leaves his family, wandering as a dumpster bum looking for scraps of food, cigarette butts or discarded alcohol. After several months he is arrested as a vagrant and returned to his home. He then repeats the cycle in 1992 this time becoming a gas pipe fitter in another town. Later, in 1998, his alcohol dependence is so bad he is forced into rehab. This book is his expression of those three periods of his life told, not in a deep or depressed way but, as befits his nature, in a buoyant and cheerful cartoon art. (Source: Ponent Mon)

title: This Alluring Dark Elf Has the Heart of a Middle-Aged Man!
titleRomaji: Watashi no Kokoro wa Ojisan de Aru
titleEnglish: This Alluring Dark Elf Has the Heart of a Middle-Aged Man!
titleNative: 私の心はおじさんである
synonyms: My Heart Is an Old Man
synopsis: With no friends, family, or romance to speak of, Haruka has lived his life just going through the motions—until the day he awakens in the body of a beautiful, and womanly, dark elf! Suddenly, a world beyond his wildest imagination awaits, and uncontainable excitement races through him. There's just one problem: He gave up on putting himself out there a long time ago and has no idea how to strike up a conversation with other people. Teenagers and (other) women are certainly no exception. But with a bottomless well of mana and a ridiculously tough body to boot, Haruka won't let any overthinking get in the way this time. Little by little, the dark elf works past his (her) fears and self-doubt, forging deep bonds with precious new friends and growing together with them. So begins a heartwarming story of an old man determined to make the most of this new fantastical lease on life! (Source: J-Novel Club)

synopsis: Born into a cursed noble family, Claude Ambrosia grows up to become the villain who destroys the empire in the novel “Flower of Darkness.” Enter Sarah Millen, the writer of this story, who is determined to change Claude’s tragic ending as his new nanny. Though cold to her at first, Claude slowly opens up to Sarah, who encourages the young boy to see his distant father, Duke Ethan Ambrosia. Can Sarah help this father and son heal? Or will the curse that haunts this family spell doom for them all? (Source: Tapas)

synopsis: Kutsuzawa Yasuo is a gloomy loner with zero friends. As he walks home alone like always, he has a chance encounter with the class’s top-tier beauty a popular gyaru admired by everyone! After helping her when she nearly falls and fixing her bicycle, he plans to quietly leave... but she looks at him with sparkling eyes instead. A gloomy introvert and a cheerful extrovert who were never supposed to cross paths yet somehow, they begin to grow closer. Thus begins an awkward but heartwarming youthful romantic comedy between two opposites.

titleNative: クラスで一番かわいいギャルを餌付けしている話
synopsis: Sakura Kouzuki, a top-tier gyaru who's the star of the class and even works as a reader model, and Houri Kazami, who prefers talking otaku stuff with his comrades in the corner of the classroom. These two, who seem to live in completely different worlds, are actually step-siblings—and secretly live together as a couple. And none of their classmates know the truth. While Sakura sparkles at school, once she's home she relaxes completely and falls head over heels for Ori's cooking. And Houri, who’s in charge of meals, doesn’t mind one bit—— “Simmered fish is sooo good~♡” “Onii-chan's cooking really is the best~!” A sweet and fluffy feeding story about a cute gyaru and their double life at school and at home! (Source: Square Enix, translated)

title: Namaiki Asahi-chan wo Wakarasetai
titleNative: ナマイキ旭ちゃんをわからせたい
synonyms: I Wanna Set This Cocky Asahi-chan Straight
synopsis: Ryou is in his last year of high school, and he's enjoying his otaku life to the fullest — except for a certain girl who's really getting on his nerves. She goes to his school and she's none other than his cocky two-year younger childhood-friend, Asahi-chan! Though she's suppose to be his kouhai, she's always teasing him whenever she gets the chance! On the other hand, if she gets teased back, she starts acting like "you can't say anything mean to me because I'm a cute girl." Furthermore, she's "afraid of people with practically no friends who can't be honest with their feelings." Someday, somehow, someone has to set this cocky Asahi-chan straight! (Source: Pocket Magazine, translated)

titleRomaji: Honzuki no Gekokujou: Shisho ni Naru Tame ni wa Shudan wo Erandeiraremasen Dai 4-bu - Kizoku-in no Toshokan wo Sukuitai!
titleEnglish: Ascendance of a Bookworm ~I'll do anything to become a librarian!~ Part 4 I want to save the Royal Academy's library!
titleNative: 本好きの下剋上~司書になるためには手段を選んでいられません~ 第四部 「貴族院の図書館を救いたい！」
synonyms: Honzuki no Gekokujou ~Shisho ni Naru Tame ni wa Shudan wo Erandeiraremasen~ Dai 4-bu 「 Kizokuin no Toshokan wo Sukuitai!」
synopsis: Manga adaptation of Part 4 of Honzuki no Gekokujou . Rozemyne has awoken from her two-year slumber. Everything and everyone has changed, which is as terrifying as it sounds, but she doesn’t have time to waste before she’s thrust toward the Royal Academy—a requirement for becoming a noble. There, she will meet all sorts of colorful teachers and students from other duchies... but can she keep her composure in the face of the most books she’s seen yet? Our bookworm goes to school in the newest installment of this biblio-fantasy by book lovers, for book lovers. (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Sugarless
titleNative: シュガーレス
synopsis: Windmill is another name for Kujima High School and it comes from the windmill that sits at the top of the campus. But Kujima is more known for having the strongest fighters and they pit against each other to be the top dog. Shiiba Gaku is only a freshman but he has his eye set on beating Aramaki Itaru, aka Shake, who is the current boss of the school. But Gaku needs to get stronger if he wants a shot at the number one title. With classmates like the big and strong afro dude Marumo Taiji, it will be do or die for Gaku at the Windmill.

title: Animan
titleNative: 動物人間
synopsis: Are we the predators or the prey? When an unsuspecting father and daughter stumble upon a strange gathering of humanoid animals with a taste for fine cuisine, their worst nightmare is about to begin. Here, creatures who are not quite human-and not quite animal at that-raise humans as livestock and slaughter them to put meat on the table. Through this bizarre and horrific tale, society's morals are put to the ultimate test: What does it truly mean to consume another living being? (Source: Yen Press)

titleRomaji: Real demo Shiawase ni Shite Kudasai ne?
titleNative: 現実世界でも幸せにしてくださいね？
synonyms: Be Happy in the Real World Too, Okay?
synopsis: High school girl Machino, who longs for the "love of destiny," loves to play the dating-sim game "Celestia." Despite maximizing the affection with all of the girls in the game, she can't decide on which one to choose for the confession event. After agonizing over the decision for days, an explosion occurs just as a shooting star flies over her house, and when Machino opens her eyes, she finds herself face to face with Sofia, the main heroine of Celestia.... "Machino... I always wanted to say it... I love you." An isekai summoning yuri harem romantic comedy begins, as her highly affectionate heroines jump into the real world! (Source: Ichijinsha, translated)

titleNative: こちら葛飾区亀有公園前派出所
synonyms: This is the Police Station in Front of Kameari Park in Katsushika Ward
Kochikame: Aquí la comisaría de enfrente del parque Kameari, distrito de Katsushika
synopsis: The typical Kochikame plot involves Ryo-san coming up with a money-making scheme by inventing a new gadget or capitalizing on a fad, achieving great success, calling on Nakagawa's help as things turn sour, and finally losing it all as the fad runs out of steam or out of control. While the plots are gag-driven, much of the humor comes from the juxtaposition of mundane characters with the bizarrely incongruous (Nakagawa's wealth, Maria's appeal, everyone's lack of actual police work), most of which is never explained or rationalized in the slightest. (Source: Wikipedia) Notes: -Volume 201 got published on October 4, 2021. -Included one-shot: Robot Santapei.

titleNative: 男子高校生、乙女ゲームの悪役令嬢に転生する。
synonyms: A High School Boy Reincarnates as the Villainous Daughter in an Otome Game
synopsis: One day, "I," an ordinary high school boy living in the present day, was hit by a truck and reincarnated in another world. But what a surprise it was to find out that I was reincarnated as Elena Evan, the "villainess" of an otome game! If this continues, the future that awaits me will either be condemnation, execution, or exile... I want to avoid that at all costs. While I was worrying about this, I found a glimmer of hope. If Tiara, the main heroine, and I could get together and find a yuri route for us, maybe we could avoid a bad ending...? However, I am now beset by a number of beautiful and handsome men?! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Ms. Koizumi Loves Ramen Noodles
titleNative: ラーメン大好き小泉さん
synonyms: โคอิสึมิซังกับราเม็งชามโปรด
synopsis: Ramen and manga are two Japanese things that people love everywhere around the world. But no one's ever brought them together before—until now! Let cool, mysterious high school student Ms. Koizumi and her girlfriends show you around the authentic ramen culture of everyday Japan in this fun food manga. The noodles, the toppings, the broth—the street stalls, restaurants, and home cooking... and yes, cup ramen too! You'll slurp down a whole new knowledge of Japan's greatest fast food that even many Japanese don't know... but Ms. Koizumi does! (Source: Dark Horse)

title: Fuuto Tantei
titleNative: 風都探偵
synonyms: ยอดนักสืบแห่งฟูโตะ
synopsis: In the ecologically-minded city of Fuuto, mysterious devices resembling USB flash drives called Gaia Memories are used by criminals and other interested parties to become monsters called Dopants, committing crimes with the police force powerless to stop them. To make matters worse, the Gaia Memories carry a dangerous toxin that cause their users to go insane to the point where they could die from the life-threatening devices. After the death of his boss, the self-proclaimed hard-boiled detective Shoutarou Hidari works with the mysterious Philip to investigate crimes which involve Dopants. Using their own Gaia Memories, Shoutarou and Philip use the Double Driver belts to transform and combine into Kamen Rider Double to fight the Dopant menace and keep Fuuto safe. (Source: Kamen Rider W Wiki) Note: Fuuto Tantei is a manga adaptation and sequel of the 2009 drama TV series Kamen Rider W .

title: Moriagaranai Date
titleNative: 盛りあがらないデート
synopsis: A So-So Match on a Dating App… Haida, cursed with chronic bad luck, signs up for a dating app as part of her “what-the-heck” phase. She matches with Kuroi, a man who joined for equally reckless reasons. But their conversation never quite clicks, and an unmistakably low-key, awkward mood sets in. Everything they do backfires, resulting in a date that is astonishingly unexciting. Thinking there’s no way there will be a second date in an atmosphere like this… wait, what? Why are they making plans to meet again!? A first date with someone you met on a dating app that just doesn’t take off? The deadpan, surreal banter is way too addictive! A slow-burn, gently unfolding romance that begins with a dating app.

synopsis: On the day of her high school entrance ceremony, ordinary high school girl Akari receives a marriage license application from the strikingly beautiful Kiyozumi Runa. Akari is bowled over in shock, and that’s before Runa shows up at her house! A torrential downpour means Runa can’t go home, which means one thing: time for a sleepover! Add Mochi, Akari’s stuffed animal and imaginary friend who loves to ship people, into the mix, and things are sure to get even more complicated! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Oishinbo
titleNative: 美味しんぼ
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Zatsutabi
titleNative: ざつ旅-That's Journey-
synopsis: Chika, who just started her career as a manga artist, was trying to find a right story for her first manga but her editor was rejecting all of her stories. Exhausted, Chika suddenly came up with an idea to travel somewhere. Somewhere, not here. She asked her social media followers which direction she should go. When the direction was decided, she sets out for her trip--a trip without any plans. First, she travels north--despite not knowing what awaits her, she manages to eat and see amazing things which she never expected. She stays in a fantastic place, enjoys everything. Sometimes, her friends join her trip...which she enjoys also. This is the ultimate travel manga for everyone who needs some time to forget everything. (Source: Kadokawa Global) Note: Nominated for the Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Manga Category.

synonyms: Mi hermanita solo quiere que la intimide
The Yandere Sister Just Wants Me to Bully Her
synopsis: Gu Xing, a novelist, deeply detests manipulative women who play coy, so she intentionally created such a main character for her webnovel, so she can abuse the fictional character in all sorts of ways! However, she never imagined that she would end up transported into her own story, and now she gets to take it out on her personally! But due to her own fetish for pretty girls, she couldn't bring herself to harm the beautiful protagonist she created, and she eventually ends up becoming her protector instead… As she was worrying about her own mixed feelings, the supposedly helpless protagonist pushes the male lead away and insistently confesses her love for Gu Xing instead! What! So I was the one being protected all along! (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Tease Me Harder: A Sweet and Kinky Romance
titleEnglish: Tease Me Harder: A Sweet and Kinky Romance
titleNative: イジめてごっこ。
synopsis: Yuka has already spent six months with her very first boyfriend, Mahiro. While they’ve been dating for half a year, they’re so pure and chaste that they can’t even hug each other without getting nervous! But for Yuka, there’s more than nerves keeping her on edge—she has a secret desire that she’s afraid to tell Mahiro. Deep beneath her sweet exterior, Yuka has a desire to be dominated! She wants her lover to take charge, tie her up, degrade her, and make her squirm from pleasure—and she’s certain if Mahiro finds out, he’ll find her disgusting. Except, that’s not true! With her submissive nature finally exposed, Yuka and Mahiro start on a new path to sexually explore one another and take their relationship to the next level. Will this bind them together forever, or will it be too intense for this vanilla couple? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Bocchi the Rock! Comic Anthology
titleNative: ぼっち・ざ・ろっく！アンソロジーコミック
synopsis: Hitori “Bocchi” Gotoh might find it hard to make friends, but that doesn't mean she's lacking in admirers! This rockin' anthology features a lineup of all-star guest authors ready to take the stage for the ultimate Bocchi the Rock! tribute concert! With a set list featuring hits such as “What If Bocchi Was Totally Ripped?,” “Kessoku Band Tours in Another World,” and “Hitori Gotoh vs the Police,” you'll discover new sides to your favorite characters you never even dreamed of! (Source: Yen Press) Volume 1 (2022/10/27) #Cover illustration: Chiba Sadoru #Illustrations: Matsuda Hikari, Uzaki Uso, Instant, Hoshi, Souma Hajime, HOJI, Iwawa 1. Bocchi the Rock!? (ぼっち・ざ・錠〈ロック〉!?) [Yuichi (ゆいち)] 2. Futari-chan no Okaimono Daisakusen! (ふたりちゃんのお買い物大作戦!) [Takeo Kyuujuu (タケオキュージュウ)] 3. Arigatou Guitar to Kinniku (ありがとうギターと筋肉) [Shirou Urayama] 4. Bocchi-chan no Otoshimono (ぼっちちゃんの落とし物) [Totsuno Takahide] 5. Bocchi-chan vs. Shokushitsu (ぼっちちゃん VS 職質) [Uraya Nagi] 6. Bocchi the Rally! (ぼっち・ざ・らりー!) [Uchino Maiko] 7. synopsis: The Caretakers' Council is a group of dedicated servants with only one goal: to nurse terminally ill Arelyn Halbern back to health. But Arelyn is already resigned to her fate, knowing she's simply an extra in a novel meant to die young. That is, until Crown Prince Pession Allermand takes an interest in her. title: Baka ni Kokuhaku
titleNative: バカに告白
synopsis: Ayumu Otsuki is a space lover with an ambitious dream—to meet an alien. Lacking friends or romantic experience, she starts an Astronomy Club by herself, to create a place where she feels she belongs. One day after school, she was putting up a poster to advertise the club when an upperclassman stepped in to help. The upperclassman introduces herself as Hayami, and Ayumu immediately falls in love at first sight with her! Ayumu's mind is now consumed by romance, and she goes all out to share her feelings. However, Senpai seems to already have other interests. She fell for a fitness junkie?! A peculiar girl's straightforward romcom!!

title: Mukashi Yuusha de Ima wa Hone
titleRomaji: Mukashi Yuusha de Ima wa Hone
titleNative: 昔勇者で今は骨
synonyms: I was a Hero but now I'm a Skeleton
synopsis: Alvis, the hero, lost his life in a battle with the Demon King. However, he lived on... as a skeleton!? Ending his career as the hero who defeated the Demon King, he spent 3 years sleeping, playing and living out every day. However, in order to find his long time friend, Izana, he once again enrolled as an adventurer, and changed his name from Alvis to Al the Skeleton. Due to his appearance being that of a skeleton, trouble springs forth in his near future!? Protecting travelling merchants, mapping unexplored dungeons and so on, whilst undertaking numerous requests, Al the Skeleton, wields his sword another day in order to save lives.

title: Youki ni Naritai Shigure-san
titleNative: 陽キになりたい時雨さん
synopsis: In modern times, it seems like the world only has need for extroverts. They're fun, sociable, thoughtful, and basically top-tier humans. But Yoshida isn't like that... So what if he's a hopeless introvert? So what if he always sits alone in the corner of the classroom? Enter Shigure, a classmate who is in the same boat. She boldly declares she's going to become an extrovert, and she challenges Yoshida to do the same...!? Watch as these two high school students try to make the most of their youth, while they still can!

titleNative: 佐々木さんはちょっとだけすごい。
synonyms: Sasaki-san Is Just a Little Bit Amazing.
synopsis: My name is Yuuki Suzuki, which may sound like a fierce name, but I'm actually a bit of a wimp. I somehow managed to muster up the courage to confess my feelings to Sasaki-san, the mysterious and beautiful girl in my class...... ummm, I'm floating!? But only by 1cm! She predicts tonight's dinner, and telepathically sends me a message that only arrives a week later...... Sasaki-san is innocent, charming, and “just a little bit amazing,” as she totally sweeps me off my feet! (Source: Futabasha, translated)

title: Hellper 2: Killberos
titleNative: 헬퍼 2 : 킬베로스
synopsis: Jang Dae-Ho, the infamous vice president of the Nine Snake Family gang overthrown after 'the purge', was disposing of dead assassins bodies in the ruins of the grand earthquake that struck the forsaken city of Kana when he found a starved and nameless orphan. Taking him under his wing and giving him the name "Gwangnam" would be the catalyst for a long and bloody revenge journey under which the name "Killberos" began. Thus, this is the dark story of Gwangnam's crime infested upbringing, riddled with the many street rivalries and gangs' power struggles that preceded the formation of the fence project and "Killberos", the guard tribe, as we know it before his passing.

Feeling hurt and crushed by the sudden dismissal, a female mage named Lilianne gave him a helping hand. Together with her, he decided to create a new guild to mess with Lucius. Eventually, those talents that Laurent found through his appraisal skill will create the strongest guild. (Source: Shousetsuka ni Narou, translated)

title: 1000 Yen Hero
titleNative: 1000円ヒーロ
synopsis: “I won't become a hero even if I am poor, because as long as Honoka continues to smile, it's all worth it.” Monsters are on the loose! But luckily for the people of Japan, heroes are there to protect them, with powers that run on a rate of yen per second. For Hiasa Sen, however, there are many more important things to worry about, like catching sales on groceries, and his many part-time jobs, all to take care of his little sister. When danger approaches, however, he has a secret power of his own, but it may be more trouble than it's worth. (Source: Comikey)

synonyms: ジャンボマックス ～ハイパーED薬密造人～
synopsis: Tateo Sone runs a pharmacy in Odawara and leads an ordinary but happy life with his beautiful wife and daughter-in-law. One day, however, when his wife tells him she is pregnant, he is shocked. It's because he has a secret: he has never had a functioning lower half of his body. His wife's child is not his own...Tateo despairs at the thought. At that time, a man named Sumaoka happens to give him a mysterious ED drug. Tateo impulsively takes the drug and is shocked to find that the function of his lower body miraculously recovers. Tateo declares to Sumaoka that he will recreate and make this medicine himself. But this is the beginning of a dangerous day that will change his life forever! (Source: Big Comic, translated)

Bird Cage of Dream Dripping Gold
หัวใจในกรงทอง
synopsis: Beginning of 16th century, Alexandra was captured by slave traders in Ukraine during one of their many raids. When the traders arrived in Greece to sell the female slaves, a young handsome man named Mateus bought her and promised to give her true freedom. He hired countless teachers, scholars, and palace ladies to train her into the one perfect woman of her time. Mateus's kindness has caused Alexandra to deeply fall in love with him, and she secretly wishes to be his concubine. But cruel fate! Mateus has already promised her to his best friend, who is Suleiman the Great, Emperor of the Ottoman Empire! Mateus promised Alexandra of true freedom, but where is freedom when she is in another man's harem and can only look at the one she loves from afar? Not willing to endure this agony, Alexandra promises herself that one day, she will free both of them from their bird cages. But Mateus is the Grand Vizier, a power only second to the Emperor himself. So Alexandra must become the most influential concubine in order to have any hope—which also means bearing Suleiman's son. synopsis: A yuri story about a yandere commoner × villainess lady. When the arrogant noblewoman He Sha tried to bully the commoner girl Qiao Lin out of jealousy, the yandere Qiao Lin turned the tables and took her first kiss instead. At first, He Sha just wanted to get back at Qiao Lin by playing pranks on her, but eventually it became an excuse to try to attract Qiao Lin's attention… The more the villainess tries to mess with the yandere, the more the yandere returns the favor, which only makes the villainess more tsundere. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

The “Princess of Hibiscus,” student council president Suzuran, and the “Prince of Hibiscus,” vice president Emma. In public, they both play their roles as prince and princess perfectly, loved by everyone, but when they are alone, they are two trusted friends who joke around and talk naturally. title: Otoko Ippiki Gaki Daishou
titleNative: 男一匹ガキ大将
synonyms: A Shining Example of Gang Leader
synopsis: This monumental manga became the driving force behind Shonen Jump, the tough kid boss of the neighborhood, Mankichi Togawa, uses his fighting skills and charm to find friends as he takes on the bad guys and the big shots who control Japan's financial world. This series, which was followed enthusiastically by the youth of the time, blazed the trail for a new class of readers. This work embodies the spirit of the magazine Shonen Jump. It had a major influence on the authors who followed. In 1969, it became the first Shonen Jump work to be turned into animation, and in 1971 it was turned into a live action film. (Source: Weekly Shounen Jump Exhibition Vol.1 Catalog)

titleNative: 冒険には、武器が必要だ!～こだわりルディの鍛冶屋ぐらし～
synopsis: Rudy has a goal—to become a top-tier weaponsmith and make the coolest weapons the world has ever seen! Sure, her boss always gets mad about her bizarre creations, but she has a blast crafting them. And she lives right outside a dungeon, so she's in the perfect spot to aid adventurers passing through on their way to fight monsters. Surely she won't bite off more than she can chew…right? (Source: Yen Press)

title: Seeds of Anxiety: Asterisk
titleNative: 不安の種*
synopsis: In the beginning, this place was filled with someone's memories—sad memories. With the passage of time, those memories break down, and every so often, they creep into our everyday world as…disturbances. Why do they show themselves to us? Perhaps they seek a mouthpiece for their own despair, or something else entirely. When strangeness takes root in a place of woe, the seeds of dread begin to germinate… (Source: Yen Press)

synonyms: The truth is, I want to enjoy my youth too.
I want to be young too, actually.
synopsis: Her hobbies are reading, and she's average at studying and sports. Otobe Murasaki is a high school student who lives a quiet life, thinking she's just a mob character, but she doesn't like Fujimi Akiko, who is always the center of attention in the class. However, as soon as she becomes a member of the gardening committee like Akiko, she quickly falls in love with her, as she talks to her in a friendly manner. Just as she is wondering if there's any way she can get closer to her, she happens to come across Akiko crying after a breakup... A girls' love comedy about a simple mob character and a sparkling girl with a difficult future ahead! (source: Ichijinsha, translated)

title: Chie Aru Koibito
titleNative: 知恵ある恋人
synopsis: The protagonists of "Chie Aru Koibito," Ushidome-kun and Shirakaba-san, are both intelligent class representatives who judge things rationally. Even though their classmates extol the two as a perfect match, Shirakaba-san declares that she "doesn't have even a second to lose herself in love." Ushidome-kun is honestly shocked by this, but he also appeals that he is "not in a state to fall in love," which upsets Shirakaba-san. They are both too conscious of each other, and the rationality of the two explosive people is on the verge of collapse. This is the love story of a male and female honor student who cannot be honest with each other and are tormented by their own worldly desires. (Source: Natalie, translated)

titleEnglish: How My Cute Girlfriend and I Started a Love Story
titleNative: 私と彼女のかわいい恋のはじめ方
synonyms: How to Start a Cute Love Between Me and my Girlfriend
synopsis: Yoshiko Yokozawa is an office lady who loves cute things and being cute herself. Because of this, she is often not taken seriously and she is fed up with it. On the other hand, Chiaki Kurisu, a sales representative from a trading company, always seems very serious when she visits for business. For some reason, Kurisu suddenly invites Yokozawa to dinner!? Outside of work, Kurisu-san is completely different from her usual business-like behavior, being totally open and vulnerable...!? “This woman, is cuter than me!?” You can’t help but fall for her. ♡ Adult girls-love ♡ (Source: Kodansha, translated) Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

title: Kyou Kara Tsukaeru Isekai Renai Manual
titleRomaji: Kyou Kara Tsukaeru Isekai Renai Manual
titleNative: 今日から使える異世界恋愛マニュアル
synonyms: A Love Manual You Can Use From Today
synopsis: Just as Haruchika Isezaki was confessing to his first love, he is suddenly summoned to another world. His summoner, the goddess Clementine, gives him an unusual mission: to make seven girls, destined to become the mothers of the next generation of heroes, fall in love again. These girls have lost their ability to love due to a curse cast by the Demon Lord. In other words, Haruchika must convince them all to fall in love with him! To return to his world and hear the answer to his confession, Haruchika accepts this mission and sets out to save another world through love. Having mastered the art of romance through his study of female psychology, his journey to fulfill their first loves begins — a romantic tale about saving another world through the power of love! (Source: Nico Nico Seiga, translated)

synopsis: Kagura is a samurai girl known as the "Sword Saint" for her mastery of the way of the sword. And Raito is a boy who belongs to a race called "Hito-youkai" that is hated by the people. The two met in their childhood and spent happy times together as best friends. Until the difference in their races separated them. Kagura took up the sword for Raito. To "live together" in order to do so, the bond between the two that transcends years transcends walls, races, and reality!! A one-shot story in the Sunday magazine received such a great response that it has been decided to serialize it! A Japanese-Western mixed fantasy with overwhelming brushwork that will rush out into the world! The start of this story!! (Source: Sunday Webry, translated)

titleNative: リンボ・ザ・キング
synonyms: リンボ ザ キング
synopsis: It's been eight years since the pandemic in which a deadly sleeping sickness claimed millions of lives. After a serious injury cost him a leg (and, nearly, his life), Petty Officer Adam Garfield retires from active service in the U.S. Navy. But his plan to focus on his family and physical therapy is shattered when he receives secret word that the sleeping sickness has returned, and it's his job to bring back the mysterious man who helped cure it by diving into people's memories—a man known by the codename "King." (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: Watashi no Hatsukoi wa Hazukashisugite Dare ni mo Ienai
titleRomaji: Watashi no Hatsukoi wa Hazukashisugite Dare ni mo Ienai
titleNative: 私の初恋は恥ずかしすぎて誰にも言えない
synonyms: My First Love Is Too Embarrassing to Tell Anyone
synopsis: Chiaki is good-looking, academically excellent, athletic, and born into a well-off family with two beautiful sisters. He leads a smooth sailing life, but he still has one problem. He's not popular with girls, and has never once been in love! He vowed to make a fresh start in high school and spend his days being pampered by girls. The morning after making this vow, Chiaki wakes up to find that he himself has turned into a girl. He is shocked to find an unfamiliar face staring back at him in the mirror, but when he looks again, he sees a very cute girl in the reflection. He immediately goes to show off his new look to his twin sister Kaede, who happens to be very popular with the girls, but there is also something very strange happening to her… (Source: Young Animal, translated)

title: Sweet Bitter
titleNative: スイートビター
synopsis: Mizuha is in a one-sided love with a college student named Ren. Mizuha's whole world revolves around him until she meets, Chiaki, a guy sitting next to her who is a pudding-loving weirdo, who freaks out whenever someone insults pudding. Ever since Mizuha refused Chiaki's pudding, he has been trying to give her some each time he sees her.

title: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Unhinged
titleNative: 극소수
synopsis: A story of murder and violence, "Unhinged" follows Erika as she walks a path of vengeance. Seven years ago, Erika came home to find her husband murdered. Unable to find any other suspects, Erika was found guilty and spends most of a decade plotting her revenge from the inside of a cell. Once freed, she finds herself moving past the boundaries of "respectable" society and beyond the shackles of morality. Laws will be broken, lives will be lost, and, yes, there will be blood. (Source: Lezhin US) Note: Chapter count includes a prologue and a 6-chapter side story

title: Ring ni Kakero
titleNative: リングにかけろ
synonyms: Put it all in the Ring
synopsis: Takane Kiku and Takane Ryuji are the children of a legendary world contender boxer. Kiku, the daughter seems to have inherited her father's boxing sense and tries to teach Ryuji to become a world contender. However, Ryuji hates boxing and gets picked on. After Kiku and Ryuji leave their hometown for Tokyo, Ryuji eventually learns to discover a passion for boxing after an encounter with a boxing prodigy, Kenzaki Jun. This will eventually lead him to learn crazy moves and out of this world opponents to become one of Japan's top junior boxers. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Zero Damage Sword Saint
titleNative: 攻撃力ゼロから始める剣聖譚
synopsis: Eugene Santafield is a young man who dreams of becoming a magic swordsman. There's only one problem, though—he can't use any attack magic! As if in exchange, the goddess of fate blessed him with extremely powerful defensive and healing magic, but he still has to endure the mockery of his peers for his lack of attack skill. After fleeing to the Lykeion Magical Academy to escape from those who know of his failings, he meets the Fallen Queen Erinyes, a Demon Queen who once ruled over the land. Erinyes, taken with Eugene's potential, appoints him to be her caretaker. In addition, the headmaster of the academy assigns Eugene to be the guardian to Sumire, a mysterious outworlder who's really an Ifrit of legend. With these two women at his side, the weakest magic sword wielder is sure to become a legendary swordsman...right? (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Puniru is a Kawaii Slime
titleNative: ぷにるはかわいいスライム
synopsis: Kotaro is an average young boy, and like many kids his age, he enjoys the latest childhood craze of playing with slime. One day, the slime randomly turns into an adorable girl who he names Puniru. Though cute, her stubbornness and constant need for attention get on his nerves. It’s like having a goopy little sister! Just when the two settle into their not-so-normal life, the granddaughter of Kyuthi Land’s founder arrives. Can Okanega Alice and her little friend Runrune out-cute the world’s most adorable slime girl?! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

title: The Tale of a Little Alchemist Blessed by the Spirits
titleRomaji: Outo no Hazure no Renkinjutsushi: Hazure Shokukyou Datta node, Nonbiri Omise Keiei Shimasu
titleEnglish: The Tale of a Little Alchemist Blessed by the Spirits
titleNative: 王都の外れの錬金術師 ~ハズレ職業だったので、のんびりお店経営します~
synopsis: Daisy’s new life is already a world apart from the last. Once cast out for a “worthless” job and left to die alone, she’s now the cherished daughter of a viscount—with a rare skill, a loving family, and a future that’s finally hers to shape. Sure, she’s been saddled with the “undesirable” job of Alchemist again, but things couldn’t be more different this time. With her Appraisal ability, the blessing of the spirits, and brand-new alchemy tools at her side, Daisy is ready to turn her second chance into something truly magical. Before long, she’s brewing potions for kingdoms, gathering rare materials with ease, and still finding time to bake fresh bread. This time, the overpowered alchemist is going to make sure her future shines bright! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titleNative: 너만 보인단 말이야
synonyms: You’re the Only One I Can See
synopsis: Following the advice of his imaginary friend Jason, who told him, "Treat all girls like stones," Park Jin-yong starts seeing every girl as a stone. But then Sunwoo, a female student who doesn’t look like a stone, appears before him, and for the first time in five years, the sight of a girl’s face sends Jinyong’s happy little circuits into overdrive... (Source: Naver, translated)

titleRomaji: Kawaihara Senpai wa Kawaii (Saotome-kun) ga Suki!
titleNative: 可愛原先輩はかわいい（早乙女くん）がすき！
synopsis: Saotome is a short boy who's not very good at sports. He thought that he would at least be able to get good grades, but starting high school, he is far from the top rank, and he feels depressed because he has nothing else to offer. He is consoled by Kawaihara-senpai, the beautiful student council president who is like a "perfect girl" that excels in sports and academics. She tells him that she has been at the top of her class since the entrance examination, and she offers to help Saotome study. However, as a condition for her help, she wants him to wear a girl's sailor suit uniform when studying with her… After school, a secret study session begins. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Super Darling!
titleNative: スーパーダーリン！
synopsis: It's not that she tries to keep to herself, exactly: It's just that everyone seems to look right through her! Naturally, Sakuya Tohno has a complex about it. She says she's just like air: ever present, but never seen. All she wants is a friend, but building relationships isn't exactly easy for someone who is, for all intents and purposes, invisible. But then she hears a legend about the "Thousand-Year Sakura" and how, if one makes a wish beneath its perpetually-blossoming boughs, it's sure to come true. So in a moment of desperation, she races to the tree, only to find four very attractive boys waiting for her... And at that moment, beneath the cherry blossoms of the ever-blooming Thousand-Year Sakura, something incredible happens! (Source: Turtle Paradise)

(Source: Magazine Pocket, translated)

title: Akuyaku Reijou-tachi wa Yuruganai
titleNative: 悪役令嬢たちは揺るがない
synopsis: It has been half a year since Aini Mikkola, the saintess in training who who hails from a barony in the countryside, arrived at the Royal Academy. The school is in turmoil. The boys, the sons of aristocrats, are at the mercy of Aini's innocent, natural cuteness, while the girls are angry at her disregard for the manners of the aristocracy. In the midst of all this, there were three daughters who were dubbed "the villainesses," in reference to a popular story. Seraphina, the crown prince's fiancée and the daughter of an upright marquise. Sandra, the noble daughter of a viscount who made their wealth from commerce. Bernardetta, the brilliant daughter of the current Prime Minister's who is a marquise. When a sense of disquiet begins to grow in the school, these women finally stand up! To correct Aini's mistakes and to follow their own hearts. This is a record of the battle between the three "villainesses" and the saintly apprentices, a battle for the way of life of women. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

synopsis: Shota Kamine is a boy who could "see? other people's hearts. With this power, he tries to use it for the good of people, but nothing ever goes right. Not being able to sought out the meaning behind the power of his eyes, he becomes discouraged and loses all hope. While then, on the school rooftop he meets a boy, Hibiki Tokisaka, and gets his own heart grasped by the sound of his saxophone!! Kamine who became interested with Hibiki, goes and visits the brass band's concert. There, Kamine witnesses Hibiki's performance shaking up and gripping the people's hearts. Hibiki, who had overcome what Kamine thought could never happen and not possible for him to even do, Kamine approaches him to talk about it, but to find out Hibiki too carry a dark past he cannot tell others. Kamine finds out his secret and he...

title: LORD
titleNative: 覇-LORD-
synopsis: The story is set in the period from the end of the Later Han Dynasty to the Three Kingdoms Period in China. In 184 AD, a brave general of the Nanukoku Kingdom, who contributed to Himiko's unification of Japan, decides to take over the "hegemony" of the Later Han Dynasty. He travels alone to Yushu in the Later Han Dynasty, where he meets the three brothers Liu Bei, Guan Yu and Zhang Fei. He works with these three brothers, but soon learns that Liu Bei is an evil person. One day, Liu Bei tries to kill a criminal to test his new sword, but Pei Yu stops him and even cuts off Liu Bei's head. Guan Yu and Zhang Fei are outraged, but Pei Yu sees and points out that the two were not following Liu Bei out of pure heart. Afterwards, Guan Yu and Zhang Fei witnessed Puo Yu's actions and thoughts and decided to make Puo Yu the new Liu Bei, and the three of them took a new oath of brotherhood in Taoyuan. Note: The story is loosely based on the Three Kingdoms period, using both real and original characters and events from the historical period in Chinese history and folklore of the Romance of the Three Kingdoms.

title: Battlefront of the Great Powers
titleNative: 列強戦線
synopsis: In the year 2206, planet Earth is on the brink of destruction. Due to pollution and a shortage of resources, scientists estimate that the planet will become unable to sustain life within the next hundred years. To resolve the issue of scarcity, the world's leaders have come together and decided on a desperate solution-the National Extinction Tournament. Gathering those with powers beyond human comprehension, these boys and girls will compete for the sake of their nations...and their own survival! Win and become a hero. Lose and death awaits not only you but everyone you love... (Source: Yen Press)

titleRomaji: Gomi Ikada to Tsuihou Sareta Shiyounin, Jitsu wa Zense Kenja Desu: Shijou Saikyou no Kenja, Sekai Saikouhou no Gakuen ni Kayou
titleNative: ゴミ以下だと追放された使用人、実は前世賢者です ～史上最強の賢者、世界最高峰の学園に通う～
synopsis: “You’re less than garbage as a servant!” Gald, a boy working as a servant for an Earl’s family, is expelled one day. With nowhere to go, Gald decides to enroll in a magic academy, something he never did in his previous life. In his past life—Gald was the strongest sage in history! In the entrance examination for the world's most prestigious magic academy, Gald, a commoner, surpasses nobles who can only use intermediate-level magic, demonstrating mastery over the highest level of magic, overwhelming them! After enrolling, Gald continues to use his overwhelming power as a sage, defeating all enemies in the arena and dungeons alike, enjoying his academy life alongside two beautiful girls he met there, Yuri and Sasha.

title: Itezuru
titleNative: 凍鶴
synonyms: Una Gru Infreddolita - Storia Di Una Geisha
synopsis: O-Tsuru (the crane), named because she used to stand on one foot to warm the other, was sold by her parents to become a geisha. She will begin as a shikomikka (apprentice) in an okiya: the house where the geisha live. By doing the commissions of his elders, Tsuru will discover the life of these women. Finally, one day, her turn arrives. She goes to her benefactor's room. Who, by paying the ceremony fees, will bring it into the world of geisha. Tsuru will then take the name of Tsurugiku and become a famous geisha in the world of pleasures. Note: It was first collected in a volume in 1992.

title: Butareba -The Story of a Man Turned into a Pig-
titleRomaji: Buta no Liver wa Kanetsu Shiro
titleEnglish: Butareba -The Story of a Man Turned into a Pig-
titleNative: 豚のレバーは加熱しろ
synonyms: Heat the pig liver: the story of a man turned into a pig.
synopsis: A run-of-the-mill otaku collapses from stomach pain after eating raw pig liver and wakes up in a whole new world—as a pig, of all things! He’s helplessly trapped in his pen until Jess, a girl who can read minds, rescues him. Our porcine hero will have to work to keep his boar-ish thoughts to himself. But sweet Jess isn’t deterred. In fact, she wants to spoil this little piggy rotten! By her side, it seems like life as a hog might not be so bad after all! For our pig protagonist to transform back into a human, he must head to the capital and appeal to the king. Jess offers to go with him, kicking off the start of their cutesy, fluffy adventure! But while preparing for their journey, what seems like a harmless shopping trip quickly gets out of hand, revealing the dark side of this world hidden beneath its peaceful facade. What can a mere pig with no special powers do to protect his angelic savior? (Source: J-Novel Club)

titleNative: 人造体温36.7℃
synopsis: Su, born in prison, has always wanted to see the "crow" from the story her mother told her. On the day she was going to be secretly executed, Gill, an artificial intelligence with a database of everything outside the prison, was thrown into prison for a test run. Su develops a special feeling for Gill, not caring whether her words are programmed or self-conscious, and not trying to tell if she has human emotions. Unable to distinguish her own human feelings... in this small cell, the lonely Su got her first doll--she met a "person" who could comfort her soul.

titleNative: 王太子様、私今度こそあなたに殺されたくないんです！ ～聖女に嵌められた貧乏令嬢、二度目は串刺し回避します！～
synonyms: You Won't Kill Me This Time, Crown Prince!
synopsis: Not-so-wealthy noble young lady, Liesel, is set up by the foul-natured Blessed one and killed by her betrothed, the crown prince. Yet, when she awakens, she isn't in the afterlife. Instead, she's a child again with a second chance at life! This time around, she's changing her fate by becoming a powerful, talented magician in order to stay as far away as possible from the Crown Prince and the Blessed One. At least, that's how it was supposed to go... This time around, those who used to be enemies oddly approach her, and events that differ from how she recalls them keep occurring... (Source: K Manga)

title: Robou no Fujii: Idai Naru Bonjin kara no Tayori
titleRomaji: Robou no Fujii: Idai Naru Bonjin kara no Tayori
titleNative: 路傍のフジイ〜偉大なる凡人からの便り〜
synopsis: Is he an eccentric or a sage? Does the seemingly unremarkable salaryman, Fujii, redefine the definition of "happiness?" In the workplace, he's a plain middle-aged man who doesn't stand out. While he does his job competently, he's not one to waste words. Come quitting time, he disappears like a ghost. He's not the type to be invited to after-work drinks in the first place. More like, he's the guy who's thought of as "I wouldn't want to end up like that..." by his juniors. Yet, he piques the curiosity of others... "I wonder how he was raised?" "Does he have friends or a girlfriend?" "What does he do on weekends?" Suddenly, you realize you've become captivated by Fujii... An elusive emotion that's hard to put into words is vividly captured by the author of Reborn no Kishi in this bewitching life drama! (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

title: 7th
titleNative: セブンス
synopsis: In a world of swords and magic, where the Goddess is revered, Lyell Walt was fortunate enough to be born the first son and heir to an earldom. That is, until his parents disown him for losing pitifully in a fight with his younger sister, Ceres. Lyell had once been hailed as a prodigy—a wonder child—but the birth of his sister changed everything. After Ceres wounds him in their duel, an enigmatic old man swoops in to rescue Lyell and bestows upon him a necklace containing a jewel that has been blessed by the goddesses and passed down through the last seven generations of Walt leaders. As Lyell sets out, necklace in hand, will he be able to prove himself despite his humiliating loss to his sister? And moreover, will he be able to solve the mystery behind Ceres’s monstrous strength and the strange sway she seems to hold over his entire family? (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Seinaru Kishi no Ankokudou
titleNative: 聖なる騎士の暗黒道
synopsis: Young Sain Forth has it made; as the famed Holy Knight, he has the people’s love, the respect of kings, and the blessings of a literal goddess. His aspirations lie elsewhere, though. With his assistant Melia at his side, he leaves for an academy in a foreign kingdom, where he is treated as a deviant by his peers. It’s his own fault, mind you—his stubborn insistance on wearing a custom, all-black uniform makes him stick out. He isn’t the only outcast in his class: Alicia, born into the Clan of Light but unable to use anything but fire magic, faces similar struggles, and the two quickly become allies. Alicia proposes that they enter the labyrinth below the school in search of a holy sword, but Sain has other plans in mind: a doom sword. And so, with his friends in tow, Sain ventures into the perilous unknown, driven by a wish to become the coolest, edgiest, most awesome thing in existence: a Dark Knight. There’s just one problem. He can’t use dark magic. Like, at all. (Source: J-Novel Club)

Now he’s back in Japan, living a normal life… until one day, he’s dragged into the mess with three high school students and summoned again—this time to a different world?! Suddenly thrust into the unknown, Riku steadies the panicked teen heroes, encourages them, and teaches them how to survive. The long-awaited opening to a second-chance another-world adventure—starring a caring, absurdly overpowered old man hero! (Source: Alpha Manga)

synopsis: His old neighbor, Ye Qiaowen, an older girl he had a crush on, just moved back to the neighborhood. But the boy Deng Xianhe knows that she likes someone else, so he keeps his feelings to himself. He is annoyed by how the smart professional woman turns into a useless bum at home, but he can't turn her down when she asks to live with him in a cohabitation arrangement. Along with Xu Yuehan, the capable senpai from his part-time job, and Xu Youzhen, his friendly and outgoing classmate, Deng Xianhe is surrounded by women, each with her own issues. It's the start of a joyous whirlwind romance, with just a trace of melancholy. (Source: Tongli, translated)

title: Youheidan no Ryouriban
titleNative: 傭兵団の料理番
synopsis: The story begins when Azuma Akari, a young man with an ambition to be a chef, trips into another world. Akari is picked up by Gangreve, the leader of a mercenary group. Akari joins the group as an odd job and gradually increases hia own value by demonstrating hia cooking skills. Each leader of the mercenary group is a quirky character, but Akari connects with them through his cooking. By improving the mercenary group's food situation and occasionally helping with inventions, Akari is gradually recognized by his fellow members of the mercenary group. However, Akari does not yet know that he himself will become a hero.

title: Tamayomi
titleNative: 球詠
synopsis: In her Junior High years, the pitcher Yomi Takeda was not able to get very far in a cross-school baseball tournament. Since the catcher on her team wasn't at her level, she couldn't use her signature move, the "Magic Throw," and eventually regretted not being able to use it. After Junior High, she decided to stop playing baseball and went to Shin Koshigaya High School, a school without a baseball club. There, she found her long lost childhood friend, Tamaki Yamazaki, who used to play catch ball​ with her when they were kids. Tamaki also played baseball during her Junior High years as a catcher, and could even catch Yomi's "Magic Throw!" Their promise with each other during their childhood could now be fulfilled! Walking together on the road of baseball once again... The story of the girls who love baseball will begin!

title: Chiisakute Kawaii Bungei-bu no Chitekina Senpai wo, Hiza no Ue ni Nosetara Mainichi Suwatte kuru You ni Natta
titleRomaji: Chiisakute Kawaii Bungei-bu no Chitekina Senpai wo, Hiza no Ue ni Nosetara Mainichi Suwatte kuru You ni Natta
titleNative: 小さくて可愛い文芸部の知的な先輩を、膝の上に乗せたら毎日座ってくるようになった
synonyms: After I Let The Small And Cute Intellectual Senior Of The Literature Club Sit On My Lap, She Started Sitting There Every Day
synopsis: One day, the Literature Club lends out its chairs to other clubs, leaving only a single chair behind. Shou and Yuzu are the only two left in the clubroom, and they end up in a lighthearted argument over who should sit in the remaining chair. Each wants the other to take the seat, and neither is willing to back down out of kindness. In the end, Yuzu gets her way, and Shou is forced to sit in the chair alone. Shou feels bad about being the only one sitting... until a sudden idea strikes him. “If I’m sitting in the chair, then I can become the chair and let Senpai Yuzu sit on my lap, right?” Or so he thinks.

titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou, 94-yonkaime no Tensei wa Heroine Rashii. Chara Guild no Haken Staff wa Tensei ga Oshigoto desu!
titleEnglish: On Her 94th Reincarnation, This Villainess Became the Heroine
titleNative: 悪役令嬢、94回目の転生はヒロインらしい。〜キャラギルドの派遣スタッフは転生がお仕事です！〜
synonyms: By the 94th Reincarnation, the Villainess Is More Like the Heroine: The Staff From the Character Guild Are in Charge of Reincarnation!
The Villainess Seems to Be a Heroine in Her 94th Reincarnation - Reincarnation Is the Job of the Dispatched Staff of the Character Guild!
악역 영애, 94번째 전생했더니 히로인이 된 듯하다.
synopsis: “I’m the ace of the Evil Noblewoman’s Guild…and I have to play the heroine now? But I’ve only ever played a perfect villain!” An evil villainess heads toward her happy ending. Madeline is the ace of the Evil Noblewoman’s Guild, having starred in 93 different stories to date. For her next reincarnation, she had hoped to get an easy assignment that would help her score a promotion...but finds herself the heroine in a School Life Romance Novel! But with her pride on the line, Madeline is not one to run away from a challenge. With the help of guild Navigator Leold playing a handsome instructor, can Madeline successfully become a heroine and find her happy ending? Find out in this villainess-turned-heroine romantic comedy! (Source: Comikey)

title: Tetsu Sabi to 1000 Carat
titleNative: 鉄錆と1000カラット
synopsis: This is a world where "Jewel-sama" are born with jewels in their eyes and special abilities. They live in a vast mansion called the "Jewel Box," and their duty is to grant people's wishes. The new arrival at the Jewel Box is Yuni, a girl with iron ore in her eyes, who is far from a beautiful jewel. Although she started her life as a "Master Jewel," she was not able to help people as much as she would like. Then she meets Alecrea, a master jeweler who is rumored to be a "Jewel Killer." He seems to be pursuing the unknown dark side of the jewelry box. In order to get closer to the truth, Yuni helps Alecrea and meets various other jewelry masters. Little does she know that she herself will eventually become the one to change the world. Follow your wishes and uncover the truth of the beautiful jewel box world. The unpredictable buddy and love fantasy between a girl with black iron and a rebellious young man begins! (Source: Pixiv Sylph, translated)

titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou no Taida na Tameiki
titleNative: 悪役令嬢の怠惰な溜め息
synopsis: I was reincarnated as a villainess from an otome game I was playing. At this rate, I'll be exiled for being in the heroine’s way of conquering love. However, in this world… there are no entertainment materials! No doujinshis, no otome games, no smartphone! I'm really bored! Of course, I should be avoiding the destructive bad end… but before that I’m going to die from boredom! "If there's no entertainment, just create it!" Using the knowledge from my past life to create toys and romance novels, I'll make this boring world fun! After becoming the queen’s favorite entrepreneur, I thought this scenario change will bring me to my wonderful future… .but now the novel I wrote has brought me to the destruction flag--!?

Old heroes must heed the call to defend their homeland and new heroes are forged as the battle for Lodoss begins anew... (Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

title: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleRomaji: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleNative: 私を好きすぎる勇者様を利用して、今世こそ長生きするつもりだったのに（多分、また失敗した）
synonyms: I’m Using the Hero Who Loves Me Too Much, Because I Planned to Live a Long Life in This World (I Probably Failed Again)
synopsis: "Please, use me as you wish." Lizette, a count's daughter, is a "Recaller" who remembers her previous lives, and she is now on her fourth life. In her past lives, always on her 20th birthday, she would be killed and eaten by the same demon. So to live a long life this time, Lizette retreated to a remote countryside sanctuary, where monsters don't appear, living quietly and peacefully. But one day she met Ralph, a boy she saved in her childhood. Somehow, he had become the country's hero by defeating a demon lord. If she could stay by Ralph's side, she might not have to die this time... With this in mind, Lizette accepted his proposal. "I will protect you, Lisette-sama, even if it costs me my life." While bewildered by Ralph's exceedingly heavy affection, Lizette uncovers the truth behind her repeating deaths. Will Lizette be able to live pass her 20th birthday unharmed this time?! It's the start of a romantic comedy between the heroine who doesn't want to die and the intensely doting yandere hero! (Source: Comic Brise, translated)

title: Kanojo wa Kyou mo Katazukanai
titleNative: カノジョは今日もかたづかない
synonyms: She Is Not Good At Cleaning Every Day
synopsis: Aina Tawara works hard at her job, she's well regarded by her colleagues, and she has a steady boyfriend of six months. But her problem is that she just can't keep her room clean. On the other hand, there is Fukagawa-san, a man who always has a clean desk, doesn't care what others think, and never works overtime. He is the complete opposite of Aina, which makes him unappealing to her in every way. On the one hand, he is annoying, but on the other hand, she is envious of him... When Aina couldn't get her place tidied up in time, she had to cancel her date with her boyfriend, and it was going to be the worst Christmas ever. When Fukagawa-san saw her depressed, he invited her over to his place…? This is a story for the messy people. For those people who can't keep thing tidy at work and at life! (Source: Pixiv Comic, translated) Note: Chapter count includes a bonus chapter.
