title: Youmuin-san wa Yuusha ja Arimasen no de
titleRomaji: Youmuin-san wa Yuusha ja Arimasen no de
titleNative: 用務員さんは勇者じゃありませんので
synopsis: A certain girl genius with more power than knowledge accidentally summoned dozens of students and teachers into a dangerous world filled with beasts and magic, but the protagonist isn’t a student or the homeroom teacher… it’s the janitor. At the time of their summoning, the students and teachers each gained a power formed from their soul, but not the janitor. As the janitor was about to be bestowed with a power that would protect him, his power was forcibly taken from him by an arrogant student. Having gone three years without a contract extension, he failed to get a job after having graduated from a third-rate university. Somehow he is still a contractor at 25 years old and was a janitor for 2 years, with a take-home monthly salary of less than ¥120,000. From a society that rejected him, he was thrust into a world that rejected him. And what janitor-san wished from the Goddess who took pity on him was…

title: This Villainess Just Wants to Take It Easy!I finally broke off the engagement, but now the second prince is totally stalking me!
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou wa Slow Life wo Enjoy Shitai!: Yatto Konyaku Haki sareta noni, Daini Ouji ga Meccha Stalker Shitekurun desu kedo…
titleEnglish: This Villainess Just Wants to Take It Easy!I finally broke off the engagement, but now the second prince is totally stalking me!
titleNative: 悪役令嬢はスローライフをエンジョイしたい！～やっと婚約破棄されたのに、第二王子がめっちゃストーカーしてくるんですけど…～
synopsis: Finally, the moment she's been waiting for - her engagement annulment! At her graduation ceremony, villainess Sylvia is hit with the classic line from the crown prince: "I hereby annul our engagement!" To which Sylvia replies with a dazzling smile and an enthusiastic "Gladly!" Falsely accused of bullying her lover, Sylvia proves her innocence with a flawless alibi. She couldn't have bullied anyone while she was picking radishes in a dungeon! Armed with a hefty settlement for her troubles and her S-Rank adventurer's license, Sylvia retires to a quiet farm to finally live out her dream of taking it easy. But just as everything starts to go to plan, her ex-fiancé's younger brother, the second prince, shows up at her door suspecting treason and moves in with her, upending her easygoing life! A delightfully chaotic, sometimes wholesome, romantic adventure awaits! (Source: Magazine House, translated)

title: Kakure Tensei @COMIC
titleNative: 隠れ転生@COMIC
synopsis: In a remote corner of another world where only the nobility can use magic, a thirty-something office worker is reincarnated as a villager named Ren (5 years old). He enjoyed a laid-back life in the countryside, until the Cruel Angels (Pretty Angels) took a liking to him... Even though he wanted to be lazy, he ended up playing hide-and-seek, reading to them, calming them down, and more from morning to night, all because he was so caring! One day, while he was trying to think of ways to be lazy, a monster suddenly appeared in the peaceful village. When the problem children were targeted, the usually unmotivated Ren unleashed a hidden power he had been hiding to avoid trouble! This is the heroic tale of a carefree reincarnated boy who, with a sense of relief, babysits (and saves the country)! (Source: Corona EX, translated)

title: MOONLIGHT MILE
titleNative: MOONLIGHT MILE
synopsis: Gorou Saruwatari and Lostman are mountain climbers who have ascended some of the highest mountains around the world. At the peak of Mount Everest, they see the ISA Space Station in the sky above and become determined to go into space. At the same time, NASA begins a program to research and obtain a new energy source which has been discovered on the moon. Gorou and Lostman attempt to join the program through different approaches: Lostman becomes a pilot and Gorou takes a job as a construction worker. Note: Originally completed with 23 volumes and 206 chapters on 2011-11-25, the author announced the publication of volume 24 on 2022-12-23, with the intention of continuing publishing irregularly.

synopsis: Introverted high schooler Xuting is used to being the target of bullies, but her life takes a dramatic turn when a new, mysteriously handsome repairman intervenes. Captivated by his quiet strength and grateful for his protection, Xuting feels an undeniable pull towards him. Yet, her world shatters when she stumbles upon his terrifying secret: he's a werewolf. Now, caught between burgeoning feelings and monstrous danger, Xuting must navigate a terrifying new reality where her protector might just be her greatest threat. (Source: WebComics)

synopsis: "I thought I was the happiest person in the world... Until that day." Aya is twenty-nine and in her second year of marriage. She was enjoying a peaceful life with her husband, a handsome and faithful man who was the envy of those around her. One day, Aya sees a certain message on her husband's cellphone, and now he's starting to come home late... "Is he actually busy with work? Or is there some other reason...?" Should Aya question her husband and risk destroying her marriage, or should she keep her doubts to herself and protect the peaceful life she has...? A marriage life of uncertainty is about to unfold... (Source: MangaPlaza)

synopsis: Luke Witharia Gilbert was destined to be the arrogant villain of a fantasy tale, but he was undone by his own pride and easily defeated by the hero. But when he’s reborn with full knowledge of how the story ends, Luke decides to take his fate into his own hands. Determined to survive this time, he sets aside his hubris and dedicates himself to training in earnest. His efforts shake the future in unexpected ways—quickly enlisting his sword instructor and even captivating a brilliant young lady from a noble family. In this version of the story, the bad guy might just come out on top! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

She struggles daily to balance parenting and work, but one day she receives a skill from the goddess—and begins her life as a true adventurer! And her weapons? A ladle and a pot lid!? The newbie mom adventurer begins her laid-back, unstoppable journey! A relaxed and fun adventure tale begins!! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleNative: 白き乙女の人狼
synopsis: Hakurai Private Academy, a boarding school where young ladies receive a higher education in bridehood. Should the maidens lose their “purity” during the three year course, they are immediately expelled, losing any chance at their dreams of becoming brides. For the girls living at this school, it is a future they consider worse than death. One day, something happens in the dormitory of the student council! In their midst is a two-faced wolf aiming for their purity - and it is up to them to pull back the mask!

titleNative: 第3のギデオン
synopsis: The stage is the eve of the French Revolution. There is the commoner Gideon, who wants to save the impoverished country side-by-side with the members of the Estates General. Then there is the aristocrat, Georges, who will use any means to achieve his purpose. A man who wants to change the country, and a man who wants to destroy it. Both begin their journey forward. Will their joint efforts of love and hatred, justice and evil lead them to a hell of bloodshed, or an ideal future? (Source: Batoto)

title: Niragi Kioumaru
titleNative: にらぎ鬼王丸
synopsis: Since his childhood, Kiomaru has been formed by master Sadamitsu of the Gassan forge so that he could later become a specialist in sword making. One day, when he learns of the brutal death of a young man to which he sold his first sword, he realize his own inexperience and decides to adopt a new attitude by following an exacting training. After avenging the young man, he continues his training, but one day, his master reveal to him an unbelievable secret: 18 years ago, meteorites nicknamed "Steel of the stars" fell from the sky on a dark mountain. Since that day, it seems the wheel of destiny enforced itself.

title: 36: Sanjuu Roku
titleNative: ３６－サンジュウロク－
synopsis: Anzu, a high school girl, lives in a household where her mother has created a "perfectly controlled environment." Defying her mother’s wishes isn’t even an option. She has no smartphone, no allowance, and her only small escape is sneaking off to the listening booths at a CD shop, hidden from her mother’s watchful gaze. One fateful night, at the station’s roundabout, she encounters someone unforgettable— A “dangerous guy” with a devilish face but an angel’s touch on the guitar. Feel the chills as you dive into this deeply moving story by a 22-year-old rising star.

title: Suterare Shiro Mahoutsukai no Koucha Seikatsu
titleRomaji: Suterare Shiro Mahoutsukai no Koucha Seikatsu
titleNative: 捨てられ白魔法使いの紅茶生活
synopsis: In a quest to subdue a golden dragon, a white mage named Amalia is double-crossed by her party, leaving her for dead with her injuries. However, the dragon takes pity on her helpless situation and restores Amalia's health in exchange for a favor: observing human life. The dragon then takes the form of a child, using "Yuugo" as an alias. As Amalia accepts Yuugo's request, she soon realizes that ten years have since passed. Mixed with shock and confusion, Amalia tries to start a new life with Yuugo as a foster son, doing her best to fulfill her new objective. Soon enough, Yuugo begins to show interest in the culture of tea, and as someone adept in brewing them, Amalia's tea-laden life will now begin!

title: Itsuka, Nemuri ni Tsuku Hi
titleNative: いつか、眠りにつく日
synonyms: Someday, the day go to sleep
synopsis: Hotaru Morino is a second year high school student who has had an unrequited crush on Ren Otaka since junior high school. One day, while on a school trip with Ren and her good friend Shiori Yamamoto, their bus gets into an accident. When Hotaru wakes up, a young man who is dressed fully in black appears in front of her. He is Kuro, a grim reaper. A shocked Hotaru shoves him away but he has shocking words for her: "I'm your guide. Hotaru Morino, listen carefully. You're dead." Hotaru learns that if she does not get over her attachment to three things within 49 days, she will end up becoming a ghost bound to a specific physical location and wouldn't be able to rest in peace. She had slept for one month after the accident and has only 19 days left. And so, Hotaru sets out to settle the three lingering regrets with the limited time she has, in the company of Kuro. One of them is to confess her feelings to Ren, her crush of five years. However, when he is in front of her, she finds it impossible to tell him how she feels. As Hotaru settles her first lingering regret, dark clouds begin to gather over her and Kuro...

titleNative: 廃公園のホームレス聖女
synopsis: One day, 15-year-old saint Alm decides she can no longer stand her boss's power harassment and runs out of the temple. She buys land in an abandoned park, builds a barrier around a bench, and begins a homeless life where she can sleep freely, create food using her holy power, and enjoy the comfortable slow life in the park. On the other hand, the temple, which has lost their saint and is no longer able to function, is in a frenzy! (Source: SB Creative, translated)

title: Bu Zhi Bixia Shi Nülang
titleNative: 不知陛下是女郎
synonyms: Unaware His Majesty Is a Girl
synopsis: The new emperor, Qi Nian, acceded to the throne many years ago. He kept refusing the requests by his officials to choose a consort, brushing them off by saying "I am busy with work. The affairs of state are more important." But Qi Nian finally relented as rumors that "the emperor is impotent" began to spread. Yu Dingdang is a rather dim-witted girl, but born to a prestigious family. This led many to say: "Miss Yu exchanged her brain for her looks". Nobody expected that she would be chosen by the emperor to be his empress consort? Yu Dingdang acted surprised on the outside, "Who? What? Me?" But inside she was thrilled, because she has wanted to become Qi Nian's bride ever since she was little. When she successfully marries her crush, that is when a slapstick comedy breaks out in the palace, when she finds out that the haughty emperor is actually a woman?! (Source: Bilibili, translated)

titleNative: 咲きそめコンプレックス
synopsis: Riko Kohinata has never been particularly interested in romance. However, she doesn't make a big deal about it, unwilling to admit it to herself or others. One day, while studying at her classmate Tomoka's house, a young girl wearing a school backpack comes in! It turned out that Tomoka has a younger sister who's an elementary school student. Riko is so captivated by the cute little girl that time seems to stand still, but the younger sister reacts to Riko with hostility instead… A heartwarming story of a high school girl who loves children and an elementary school girl who wants to grow up. This age-gap girls' love comedy is about to begin! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Sky Blue
titleNative: スカイブルー
synopsis: Kazama’s family died in a mysterious explosion when he was still young and since then, he has not been able to come to terms with their deaths or even with himself. He emotionally distances himself from everyone and his aggressive nature gets him the nick name “Real Life Combat Game Character.” Years later, Kazama, now in high school, gets close to death after a car accident. As he accepts his fate, Sky Blue enters his consciousness. Somehow related to the multicolored meteors that were seen all around the world on the same day of Kazama’s near fatal accident, Sky Blue is able to control his body. The teenage-looking Sky Blue is able to control Kazama’s body movements and even his speech. He falls for the beautiful but cold Haioka Anna and when she gets kidnapped, Sky Blue takes over Kazama’s body, unleashing enormous amounts of power and strength.

One day, Kurisu, a girl who was born and raised in a remote area, learns that she has the [House Building Skill]. When her memories of being Kurisu Niina, a Japanese woman, come back to her, she decides to leave the remote area and become an adventurer. After a grueling journey, she arrives in the labyrinthine city of Garel, and tries to build her own house and enjoy living alone, but the officials tell her that people from other countries can't even live there permanently. Thinking, "If so, let's make a house where you can travel!", she remodels a used carriage and begins to make an ideal home. Now begins the story of a girl who lives single-mindedly in a different world where her life depends on her skills! Note: Includes 1 extra chapter.

title: Getter Robo High
titleNative: ゲッターロボ牌
synopsis: When a technologically advanced civilization rises from the ocean and conventional weapons fail, three pilots are assigned to operate an experimental machine powered by Getter Rays. Their opponents do not rely on force alone. Each battle is designed to disrupt judgment, break coordination, and push them into mistakes made under pressure. Written by Bingo Morihashi and illustrated by Drill Jill, Getter Robo High centers on conflict shaped by uncertainty. Decisions must be made quickly and with incomplete information. Hesitation, misreading an opponent, or acting too aggressively can change the outcome without warning. As the fighting continues, the threat becomes less predictable, and the stakes grow beyond what the pilots expected. The strain of responsibility and isolation begins to affect how they think, how they trust each other, and how much risk they are willing to take. Drawn in dense, high-contrast black and white, the artwork creates a constant sense of compression and urgency, keeping the action close and immediate. In the darker tradition of Getter Robo, escalation comes through sudden reversals and mounting risk. The story focuses on what sustained pressure does to peopl

titleNative: ギャルとクチュール～有明モモは服を作って優勝することにした～
synonyms: Gyaru to Couture: Ariake Momo wa Fuku wo Tsukutte Yuushou suru Koto ni shita
synopsis: The story is based on the Fashion Koshien (National High School Fashion Design Championship) held in Hirosaki, Aomori Prefecture. Ariake Momo, a gal who grew up in a snowy country, meets Ujou Ren, a boy her age who aspires to be a designer, and they try their hand at making clothes to express the "cute" that only they can find inside of them. Momo and Ren then team up to aim to win the Fashion Koshien. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Kochira, Shuumatsu Teitai Iinkai
titleNative: こちら、終末停滞委員会。
synopsis: Kotoyorozu Kotoha, a boy with an underground past as a former mafia underling, had given up on youth. However, his life changes completely after meeting certain girls. With massive guns, they fight against mysterious beings threatening to destroy humanity! This is their school life — full of chaos, action, and unexpected twists. Behind the facade of the world lies a wild and outrageous youth like no other! A mega-serialized story packed with sci-fi, romance, action, and more — let the fun begin!

title: Aoku Somero
titleNative: 蒼く染めろ
synonyms: Dye Blue, Even If You Die
synopsis: The older brother was a genius. At just 15 years old, he was already receiving offers from top teams around the world — a true “treasure of Japanese soccer.” Would it be Madrid or Barcelona? Or perhaps a prestigious club in England? The entire country was watching with anticipation to see where he would go. But the young prodigy made a surprising choice: he decided to attend “a Japanese high school where his underachieving younger brother would be enrolling.” “Because there’s someone amazing there that I want to play with!” With the “genius older brother” and the “underachieving younger brother,” let them stir up a storm in the world of soccer! (Source: Magazine pocket)

title: Doukutsu Ningen
titleNative: 洞窟人間
synopsis: The story follows a young man Hajime who returns to his hometown and meets up with an old friend. While catching up, the two somehow find themselves in front of the local legend: The Man-Eating Cave. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Isekai Henkyou Meshi
titleNative: 異世界辺境メシ
synonyms: Meals on the Frontier of Another World
synopsis: A lone diner stands in the remote frontier. Drawn by the cooking of a human known only as “Master,” demons, elves, and others of all races gather to savor his food. On the stage of this small restaurant, a gourmet tale of joy and sorrow alike begins to unfold! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

synonyms: 反派小少爷千方百计想要改变的日常

악역 영식의 어떻게든 하고 싶은 일상
synopsis: ♪ A loose and fluffy isekai reincarnation fantasy where the villain's son does his best to avoid ruin ♪ When I was selfish and laughing loudly, I (6 years old) remembered my previous life. Is this the world of RPGs? Moreover, I am the weakest of the three brothers, defeated by the heroes of the future, the so called "villain". I'm so unlucky. It's terrible. Confused, depressed, and worried, I made up my mind. First of all, let's stop being a villain! Be a good boy, get along with your beloved brothers and servants, and defeat the death flag! (Source: Ichijinsha, translated)

synonyms: I Left My Magic Behind in Another World. A Terrible New Game for Little Sister Who Was Once a Genius Mage.
synopsis: Mikan, a young girl transported to a world of swords and magic, grows up to become a great mage who saves that world from crisis—only to be sent back to her hometown, Niigata. Having lost her magic and companions from the other world, Mikan becomes a shut-in. Her older brother Itsuki, who has waited ten long years for her return, does everything he can to show her the joys of this world and gently coax her outside—but will he succeed…?! (Source: Comic Gardo, Translated)

titleNative: いっツー
synopsis: Sagami was dragged into sneaking into the high school that he and his two other friends were attempting to be accepted into after they graduate from middle school. While sneaking around, observing the high school girls, Sagami noticed one girl that stood out. It was love at first sight. He took a picture of her with his cell, and now uses it as his "reward" for studying harder to get into the high school. Due to this "reward" system, he successfully got accepted into the high school where the girl of his dreams attends. Now, an odd and awkward high school love life begins for Sagami. (Source: MangaHelpers)

In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? synopsis: The first "Love Live!" series comic adaptation by Shueisha! Hasunosora Girls' High School, located in a remote area of Kanazawa City, Ishikawa Prefecture, beside a lake with lotus flowers in bloom. At this high school, which was founded over 100 years ago, the traditions handed down from long ago still live. This is where an energetic girl called Kaho Hinoshita enrolls with the goal of "blossoming". After being frustrated at first for not getting what she is looking for, she will discover something that will change her vision of Hasunosora: school idols.

title: Cry Eye
titleNative: クライアイ
synopsis: Asahi and her friend Yamato went together to an exclusive event as test players for a new game from the cellphone-game company "Sky Nova." The test players were a diverse lot of all ages, from ordinary teens like Asahi to popular idols. The company took all of them on a cruise to explain the rules of this island-based, treasure-hunting survival game. Suddenly, during the presentation, all of the participants lost consciousness. They woke up on an actual island wearing a strange watch with the words "Game Start." Now they are all stuck in this survival game, which has become all too real and deadly!

synopsis: Chiharu the cyborg and Makina the cyborg are arrested for violating the Galactic Road Traffic Act. At the same time, the police also arrest two other eccentric duos: Akane and Kanata the cyborgs, and Kurt and Max the cyborgs. Police officer Ryoko gathers them all together and assigns them a volunteer task: cleaning the interplanetary train known as the "Milky☆Subway." It was supposed to be a simple mission, but before long, they find themselves embroiled in a major incident. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Harassment ga Kowai Maki-senpai!
titleNative: ハラスメントが怖いマキ先輩！
synonyms: Maki Senpai is afraid of harassment!
synopsis: The editor-in-chief, Maki Ishikawa, is kind to co-workers, good at her job, and acts like the ideal boss! But in front of her junior colleague, Nodoka Minami, she starts acting strangely. "Maki-senpai, I can always count on you!" Minami says with a big smile. Maki wants to get to know Minami better, but she is worried, "Would it be harassment to ask for her phone number?" “Is it be too much if I ask her out to lunch?" she wonders… Aah!!! She definitely doesn't want come across like a creep, but she wishes they could be be friends! (Source: forcs, translated)

title: Thus Spoke the Rabbit
titleNative: うさぎはかく語りき
synopsis: Once known as a bustling and chaotic city of youth, Shibugaya has become a ghost town ever since man-eating rabbits took up residence underground… But in the face of such danger, wolf girl Izuko, with her bunny-girl friend by her side, arrives on the scene to take on the underground! (Source: Yen Press)

title: Xiao Yang Xiangdao Cong Bu Zuoyou Weinan
titleRomaji: Xiao Yang Xiangdao Cong Bu Zuoyou Weinan
titleNative: 小羊向导从不左右为难
synonyms: I Became a First-Class Guide Thanks to My Childhood Friends
靠发小我变身顶级向导
Kao Fa Xiaowo Bianshen Dingji Xiangdao
synopsis: The twin brothers love me too much. What should I do? D-class guide Qiao Yang, because of a drunken accident, discovered that he could use the two A-class sentinels, his childhood friends Zheng Jia and Zheng Yan, to enhance his own class. In order to retain this rare S-class status, he chose to conceal his exploitation of them. However, during the repeated interaction with the two, he gradually becomes aware of their feelings towards him… (Source: Bilibili, translated) Note: Originally serialized under the title “Kao Fa Xiaowo Bianshen Dingji Xiangdao (靠发小我变身顶级向导)”.

title: Minami no Teiou
titleNative: ミナミの帝王
synopsis: The manga centers around Ginjirou Manda, a loan shark business man who is affiliated with many Yakuza gangs in Osaka. He charges an interest rate called toichi — 10% more interest every 10 days, or 365% every year. Thanks to his unrelenting money-collecting tactics, he is feared as "Minami no Oni" or the "Demon" of Osaka's Minami business district. Even when his borrowers tries to scam him, he always finds a way to make them pay his money back. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: 木っ端舞い散る その頃に
synopsis: Kei Maebara gets a job!! The bizarre and eerie world of public service, depicted by Ryukishi07, from Higurashi When They Cry . In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region... Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to semi-criminal lifestyles has led to a drastic decline in public safety... Amidst all this, Kei Maebara begins working at the district office. Can he become a respectable public servant? (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

title: Futari Machiaruki
titleNative: ふたり街あるき
synopsis: Hina has just moved into her own place to start university, in a town that's livable but rather dull and boring. She figured, “Well, it's just for four years of college, so I'll just put up with it...” until one day when she meets Kage, a young man taking photos of seemingly ordinary spots around town. Intrigued by Kage's photos, Hina decides to join him on a stroll through the city! Suddenly, her impression of this boring town begins to shift...!? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

Suddenly, she is married to a Navy husband. Their (fairly) inexperienced in house matters, as well as in the affairs of men and women, begin their life as a couple in the highest degree of purity! When the sea breeze blows, I think of you. A story of a couple living in prewar Japan, spring, summer, fall, and winter, humble but gentle.

title: Napoleon: Era of the lion
titleNative: ナポレオン ─獅子の時代─
synopsis: This is a story of the life of Napoleon. The tale begins just before the Battle of Austerlitz. Then, it jumps back to 1769 to tell the story of Napoleon's life from the very beginning, including the circumstances of his birth, his childhood on Corsica, and his difficulties as a Corsican boy in a French school. All of these experiences eventually culminate in his becoming the famous Emperor of the French.

titleNative: けがわとなかみ
synopsis: One day, a fox is ready to pounce on a rabbit, only to receive a confession from its would-be prey. Ignoring the fox's confusion, the rabbit professes, “I love you.” As this bold approach takes effect, the fox's hard heart begins, little by little, to soften. Will predator and prey ever be able to coexist…? (Source: Yen Press) Note: Includes three extra chapters.

titleNative: 女神の代行者となった少年、盤上の王となる
synonyms: The Boy Who Became the Goddess's Proxy Rises as the King on the Board.
synopsis: Luca, whose homeland was destroyed by a powerful curse, ended up bearing the curse himself. Determined not to let anyone else suffer the same misfortune, he sets out to uncover the curse's true nature by becoming a top-tier adventurer. Along the way, he meets the goddess Selimys and decides to become her "Proxy" (follower). Thus begins an adventure fantasy where a boy, now a servant of the goddess, races through a world entangled in divine conspiracies alongside his comrades! (Source: Futabasha, translated)

At that time, Ji-he, a korean girl, was looking for a member to join Brassica, a blind soccer team from Ikebukuro. One day, a blind young man called Oyamada came to the cabaret club where she works. Oyamada, who has no experience in blind soccer, is forced to join to team to match the required number of members. However, this man is actually...

titleRomaji: Hai no Sekai wa Kami no Me de Irozuku: Ore dake Mieru Status de, Saijaku kara Saikyou e Kakeagaru
titleNative: 灰の世界は神の眼で彩づく～俺だけ見えるステータスで、最弱から最強へ駆け上がる～
synopsis: A world where dungeons have appeared and humans have acquired magical powers... here, the amount of magical power one is born with is an indicator of one's strength. Kai Amachi, the weakest adventurer with little magical power, is braving the dungeons to earn money for the medical expenses of his sick sister, Nagi. However, Nagi's condition suddenly takes a turn for the worse. A huge amount of money is urgently needed for her treatment...!? In dire straits, Kai recklessly participates in the survey of an unknown dungeon with a large reward at stake... (Source: Overlap, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Hai no Sekai wa Kami-no-me de Irodoku: Ore dake Mieru Status de, Saijaku kara Saikyou e Kageagaru

titleNative: きもちわるいから君がすき
synopsis: Tsukasa is in love with her best friend Yoriko, but she hides her feeling and lives her daily life as if nothing's wrong. In the meantime, Yoriko also seems to have deep affections for Tsukasa. This is a pure, precious, but disturbing story of their twisted love. (Source: Manga Time Kirara, translated)

title: Replica: Revenge of the Ex-Wife
titleNative: レプリカ 元妻の復讐
synopsis: Aoi grew up constantly being made fun of and bullied for her appearance. After going through one bad experience after the other in school, she finally gets to marry the man of her dreams who loves her for who she is. However, he too eventually seeks out someone better-looking and cheats on her, resulting in their divorce. Oddly enough though... the woman he cheated on Aoi with is the same girl who bullied her throughout their school years...! Now Aoi's on a mission to get revenge on the man who cheated on her who is now married to the woman who made her life miserable. She has her face reshaped, her name changed to Sumire, and slowly begins to find her way into their lives... (Source: MangaPlaza)

The wandering, mud-covered former prince finds himself at an inn run by Emma, a girl who has a severe obsession with royalty drama. Emma is bewildered by the sudden appearance of her "Oshi", and determined to get him back on his feet, she embarks on a grand project! (Source: ComicGardo, translated)

titleRomaji: Kimi ga Iu ni wa Inu no Koi
titleNative: 君が言うには犬の恋
synopsis: "I just want to live my life listening to someone's orders and being praised..." Is that a sinful, unrealistic dream? Yet, that was the sole wish of ordinary high school student Akira Tamanoi. Days without dreams or motivation... One day, as punishment for being late, Akira is assigned to help the student council and meets the intelligent and beautiful student council president, Makoto Miyauchi. And then, something unexpected happens. Miyauchi constantly asks Akira for favors. "Please... thank you!" "You can't do it? You did well!" Without understanding the meaning of the comfort given to him by Miyauchi, Akira becomes completely engrossed in this suddenly realized dream... There he was, my wonderful master. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Brenny-wa Binjari
titleNative: 브린니와 빈자리
synopsis: The story of a possessed person in a book who will not hesitate to kill for her goal. Brinny, who lived in obedience to her stepfather, thought it had nothing to do with her. Until she got involved in an incident with the sickly second prince, Lucian. At a moment of crisis, Brinny used her supernatural powers to save Lucian, and was relieved that everything was resolved when she saw that the possessed person, 'Aridna', was captured. However, for some reason, her beloved sister and the first prince died in a carriage accident, and even Lucian, who became her fiancé, began to act strangely. Wasn't the possessed person executed in the past? Is 'Aridna' still alive? Brinny decides to reclaim the empty space left by the disappearance of her precious people. She will fight the possessed person. (Source: Kakaopage, translated)

titleNative: お嬢様系底辺ダンジョン配信者、迷惑系をボコったらバズって伝説になってますわ！？
synopsis: The original story is set a few years after dungeons began appearing in the modern world. Karin Yamada is a "dungeon streamer," a new kind of streamer who live streams their expeditions in the dungeon. Though she has adopted the character of a classy rich lady, with zero views and three subscribers, she is decidedly obscure, and depressed about it. One day, she stumbles on an adventurer trying to stir up trouble for views by causing an explosion in a dungeon. Karin immediately leaps into action and stops it by beating up the adventurer. Little did she know that the adventurer was also streaming to a wide audience, who all saw her beating up and lecturing the adventurer. The incident propels her to overnight popularity. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Agnes Kamen
titleNative: アグネス仮面
synopsis: Professional wrestler Yamamoto Jingo just returned to Japan from a 5 year training trip in the US and Mexico, only to be greeted by his now defunct wrestling company: Yamato. He's come to find out that as soon as the president of the company passed away, the rival wrestling group "Teijitsu" took down Yamato. Jingo has now been forced to go seek revenge for the destruction of Yamato by challenging the Teijitsu president. One thing led to another, and now Jingo has been half-forced into working under Teijitsu as the new wrestler from Brazil: Agnes Kamen. (Source: MangaHelpers)

title: Noppiki Naranu
titleNative: ノっぴきならぬ
synopsis: Seven years ago, Toraji met the most beautiful man he had ever seen. The time they spent together was as passionate as it was brief, and the man disappeared among the multitudes of Edo, the shogunate's capital. Toraji never learned his real name, or address, or occupation - but he never gave up on finding him again. Only, he didn't expect that when he did, the man would turn out to be the master of a high-class ryokan and restaurant, or that he would have a young daughter. How did this happen? Why did he run? Who is the child's mother and where is she? And most of all, will Toraji get a second chance to pursue the one great love of his life?

title: Tabi to Michizure
titleNative: タビと道づれ
synopsis: Tabi is traveling to a town to meet her Childhood friend, "Kou-chan", on a train. When she arrives, she meets an Officer, Nishimura, and an energetic young man. Yukita; both are which surprised that she came on a train that has never come before. Shortly after arriving, she discovers this town isn't ordinary in the least, and has a puzzling problem. Certain roads in the town will try to "eat" people by randomly falling into a deep pit, the town resets after each day, making the same events as the previous day occur, and the townspeople don't notice anything out of the ordinary, forgetting each time; the exceptions being Tabi, Yukita, and Nishimura.

titleNative: 비질란테 2부
synopsis: After graduating from the Korean National Police University and becoming a detective, Ji-Yong is assigned to investigate a suspicious report and comes face-to-face with a nationwide jeonse scam. As he confronts criminals who slip through the cracks of the legal system without proper punishment, Ji-Yong begins to question the rules of vigilante justice he once set for himself. While pursuing the scam’s ringleaders, the four vigilantes receive a threat from someone who knows their true identities and begin to sense the looming presence of a far greater evil. (Source: WEBTOON)

synopsis: Sara, a mermaid living in the modern world, has been dealing with yokai and humans alike as a “Trader.” To her, humans are merely clients—trusting them with her heart was never an option… One day, a mysterious young man named Sora wanders into her miniature garden. He doesn’t seem like an enemy, but there’s clearly something unusual about him. Sara offers him a deal. However, the one thing Sora truly desires turns out to be none other than Sara herself…!? A cohabitation romance filled with love and secrets begins—all starting from a single “deal”! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Tyranno
titleNative: ティラノ
synopsis: The setting is the year 202X, in Kamata, Ota Ward, Tokyo, which has become one of the world's leading entertainment districts due to the opening of the Kamata Line. The area has attracted big money and become overrun by organized crime, foreign criminals, terrorists, smugglers, prostitution rings, and the hidden agendas of financial, political, and bureaucratic power players. A rookie police officer, Nonogami, is newly stationed at the station's main gate police box. She despairs over the overwhelming corruption around her. However, with the help of a massive fellow officer known as "Tyranno," they begin to clean up the area. (Source: Comic Polca, translated)

synopsis: Ru-Min is an acting prodigy with a Newtube channel that often goes viral. As it happens, she is also the spitting image of her favorite A-list actor Ha-Jin Jeong. A shocking turn of events reveals that Ha-Jin is actually Ru-Min’s biological father. The cold-hearted actor reluctantly takes her in, but pointedly vows no affection. However, as Ru-Min’s raw talent shines, Ha-Jin finds himself becoming an unlikely mentor. Having long fantasized about Ha-Jin being her father, can Ru-Min finally make her dreams a reality? (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Kui-tan
titleNative: 喰いタン
synonyms: The Case Files of the Gourmand Detective
synopsis: "Holmes Agency" is a private detective office known as the "Big-Eating" Detective Office. Seiya Takano, who is known for have a huge appetite, gets assigned to this office as the new leader. Ryosuke Noda and Ryoko Izumi, both also having a big appetite work under Seiya. Murder, robbery, and kidnapping—many incidents occur around them. And the three solve each of the many cases in a most surprising way—their appetite results in marvelous speculations! They eat at themurder scene. They eat on the track. They even eat dog food! They keep on eating and eating, not even listening to the witness. Everywhere they go, they eat and eat and eat! And every time after finishing, the criminal appears. KUITAN is the words "Big-Eating" and Detective combined together. "Real Gourmet" plus "Real Mystery." The big-eating detectives are on the run, solving cases from their deep knowledge about food.

title: Kakeru
titleNative: カケル
synopsis: Daiba Kakeru has always felt like he entered a new world whenever he ran. Tiring himself out by running would cause something like a runner’s high and his five senses would go into overload, causing them to be hyper sensitive. He would be able to notice tiny details, hear ridiculously faint or far sounds and his body’s reaction time would be incredibly quick. Kakeru has had a crush on his classmate Natsume for months now and he's finally able to ask her out, only to find out that she ran away from home that same night. But Kakeru picks up on the subtle clues left behind and realizes Natsume was kidnapped. With the help of his resourceful science teacher Nezu Michiko, Kakeru uses his love as a motivation and hyper senses to track down Natsume.

synopsis: Roy Aveillam, the arrogant son of a notorious duke, is widely feared. But one heated clash with a rival classmate jolt something deep within –his memory of a past life returns, as does a burning desire: to master a craft and become someone extraordinary. Reincarnated at just eight years old, Roy awakens to the world's latent magic and vows to redefine himself –not just by his lineage, but by his will. (Source: Titan Manga)

title: Even Exiled, She's Still the Beloved Saint! St. Evelyn's Weird and Wonderful Friends
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Sareta Seijo desu ga, Jitsu wa Kunijuu kara Aisare Sugitete Kowain desu kedo!? Seijo Evelyn to Yukai na (?) Nakama-tachi
titleEnglish: Even Exiled, She's Still the Beloved Saint! St. Evelyn's Weird and Wonderful Friends
titleNative: 追放された聖女ですが、実は国中から愛されすぎてて怖いんですけど!?～聖女イヴリンと愉快な（？）仲間たち～
synopsis: For years, Saint Evelyn has protected her country with her powerful healing magic, earning her the love of the people. But then, the first prince breaks off their engagement and strips her of her title, only to name her incompetent half sister as the new saint. Cast out from the only life she's ever known, Evelyn is forced to find her place in a world that suddenly feels all too vast. Fate smiles upon her when she stumbles upon a young boy from the streets who shows her a new path: making a living with her healing magic. The next thing she knows, she's earned her first commission—and a handsome count is proposing to her?! With discontent growing in the royal family over the prince's folly and adoring fans flocking to her side, Evelyn must navigate political intrigue, newly realized fame, and unexpected romance in the air. Now if only she would realize just how much everyone adores her! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Streaming War
titleNative: ストリーミング・ウォー
synopsis: To become a top-notch streamer, a reckless girl named Yoru Kihara, also known as "Angel Hell," earns money through extreme streaming. Thanks to the support of her fans, she managed to save up her target amount to move to the city. However, her abusive parents took everything: her savings and her streaming equipment. In utter despair, Yoru attempts her final act—streaming her own suicide from an abandoned building. But suddenly, she’s attacked by someone wearing a creepy rabbit mask. This marks her fateful encounter with "Streaming War," a grotesque streaming site where underground streamers go to satisfy their insatiable need for recognition!

title: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleNative: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synopsis: The grim city of Oosaka is controlled by the Yakuza. On the secluded artificial island of Sakishima, there exists a rumour: There is a "wolf" out hunting the Yakuza. This wolf would use a demon sword to slay the Yakuza's dignity. That is, this sword has the ability to turn them into little girls!!!! A tale of the high-school student who hunts Yakuza and the former-Yakuza girl! These pretend-siblings with a bond too strong will face the Yakuza infesting Oosaka. This is a battle-filled and action-packed story of chivalry featuring big twists and turns!!!

title: Under Your Care
titleNative: 请多关照
synopsis: My ex-boyfriend is sitting across from me right now, which is the craziest thing of all! This is a blind date gone wrong! Can it be any more awkward? Is there a kind of fate at work, or is there something funny going on? (Source: WebComics)

title: Atashi Merry-san. Ima Isekai ni Iruno…….
titleRomaji: Atashi Merry-san. Ima Isekai ni Iruno…….
titleNative: あたしメリーさん。いま異世界にいるの……。
synonyms: It's Mary-san. I'm in another world now...
synopsis: Naibara Hirokazu left his parent's home in Miyagi to attend university in Tokyo and began living alone in an apartment in Saitama. Soon after moving, he answers a phone call from an unknown number that rings repeatedly, and hears a girl's voice saying "I'm Mary, I'm at the garbage dump right now... I'm the doll you threw away..." Thinking it's a prank call, he hangs up, but the call comes again and again... It seems like the girl is calling little by little, moving towards him!? The next day, he answers the phone, not knowing how many times it has already been called, and hears "I'm Mary, I'm in front of your room right now..." No sooner does he hear a strange voice praying from outside the apartment...? A phone call from Saitama to give advice to Mary, the urban legend who has been transported to another world!? A little girl connected by smartphone to a university student's story of defeating the demon king!! (Source: Gamma Plus, translated)

title: Zeitaku Zanmai shitai no desu! Binbou Ryouchi no Mahou Kaikaku Akuyaku Reijou Nante Narimasen!
titleRomaji: Zeitaku Zanmai shitai no desu! Binbou Ryouchi no Mahou Kaikaku Akuyaku Reijou Nante Narimasen!

synonyms: Zeitaku Zanmai shitai no desu! Tensei shita noni Binbou Nante Yurusenai node, Mahou de Ryouchi Kaikaku
贅沢三昧したいのです! 転生したのに貧乏なんて許せないので、魔法で領地改革
synopsis: On her fifth birthday, Sallestia remembers her previous life and her life of poverty with the shock of a blow to the head... And now, to her surprise, she understands that she has been reincarnated as the villainesss in an Otome game! "I was poor in my previous life, and now that I've been reincarnated as a nobleman's daughter, I'm going to enjoy all the luxuries!" But... The servants and villagers of the estate are all skinny and on the verge of starvation...? I can't allow myself to be poor in my reincarnation! I'll use magic to reform the estate and make the villagers and myself rich!
chapterSourceTitle: Zeitaku Zanmai Shitai no desu! ~Tensei Shita no ni Binbou nante Yurusenai no de, Mahou de Ryouchi Kaikaku~

title: A.O.Z Re-Boot Gundam Inle: Kuro Usagi no Mita Yume

titleNative: A.O.Z Re-Boot ガンダム・インレ-くろうさぎのみた夢
synonyms: Advance of Zeta Re-Boot: Gundam Inle - Black Rabbit Had a Dream
synopsis: A.O.Z Re-Boot Gundam Inle: Kuro Usagi no Muta Yume is set in U.C. 0091after the end of the First Neo Zeon War. Zeon Remnants had retreated to Mars, forming "ReZeon" under General Alicia Zabi. By absorbing the Titans remnants after the Gryps War, they strengthened their military strength. This story depicts the Titans comeback that began on Mars. Their dream--what does "the shining star again" mean? Look, with a bird's-eye view, at the memories of their battles spun in history. Note: The first chapter was pre-published on April 25, 2014 in Dengeki Hobby Magazine.

titleNative: 天外飞来不是仙
synopsis: The immortal cultivator Yi Genqing (the male protagonist) failed to ascend and mistakenly entered the interstellar world. He, the female protagonist Alex, and the captain of the guard Lei were swallowed by a huge and vague mysterious alien. The three woke up in a place similar to a prison and found that many strange people were imprisoned there. In order to escape, they teamed up with the perverted robot, the crazy and thrill-seeking Irlin with telekinetic ability, and the autistic but defensive Tolby. In the contradictions and conflicts, they began to be unreliable. (Source: Tencent, translated)

These are the ultra-powerful and ultra-wealthy 13 dragons, mostly linked to the Mafia. However it was not counting on the arrival of a cook who fears no pressure. Known in the culinary world for his pranks and his eccentricity, he was once involved in the murder by poisoning. After disappearing for years in China, where nobody knew what he was doing, Jan is back!

synopsis: An occult comedy about two middle school boys. After one of them accidentally discovers that every photo his classmate takes turns into a ghost photo, he comes up with the idea to sell them on an online auction site. At first, they list the photos just for fun, but the bids start climbing far beyond anything they expected. Shocked, they hurriedly cancel the listings—but it turns out they have a serious reason for needing the money. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Jeonjik Seongnyeowa Heungmagui Bimil Yeonae
titleNative: 전직 성녀와 흑막의 비밀 연애
synonyms: 元聖女と黒幕公爵の秘密恋愛
Secret Love Affair Between a Former Saint and a Dark Hero
synopsis: Ji-Yeon Kim, a college student on a leave of absence, was living an ordinary life until she found herself possessed into a romance novel her friend had shown her: The Saint's Flower. She became Iola, a girl who appeared halfway through the book. The world of the novel, centered around the saintly heroine and her romantic lead, was not meant for her. Still, she thought that becoming a character in a story might bring her happiness—just like the protagonist of a novel would. But everyone hurled hatred at her. They despised her. They called her Iola, the wicked woman who tormented the heroine—a false saint. But the truth was different. Iola herself was the true saint. Blessed by the divine, she returns to the very beginning. This time, she no longer needs her family, those who hate her, the title of Saint, or even the fiancé she once loved. She will walk a different path than before. "Even if this world tries to turn me into a villainess, I don’t care. I will survive and I will find happiness!" (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Voiceless Sacrifice of the Black Dragon
titleRomaji: Koe Naki Niehime to Kokuryuu no Kekkon
titleEnglish: The Voiceless Sacrifice of the Black Dragon
titleNative: 声なき贄姫と黒龍の結婚
synonyms: The Silent Sacrifice Princess And The Black Dragon's Marriage
The Voiceless Sacrifice of the Black Dragon
synopsis: The Kozuki family was granted the Black Dragon's blessing, allowing them to heal the sick and purify impurity with their voices alone. But Ayame's life shatters after her parents' death, leaving her at the mercy of her cruel aunt and uncle, who tortured her until she lost her voice. As their daughter, Mari, rises to become the new priestess, Ayame is offered as a sacrifice to the Black Dragon. "Why do I have to die like this? Please help me!" In response to her desperate plea, the Black Dragon appears as a striking man and takes her hand, whisking her away to his realm. Chosen to be the bride of the Black Dragon Saku, Ayame finds herself in the enchanting Black Dragon Manor, suspended between the heavens and the human world. But jealousy ignites in Mari, who vows to reclaim Saku and make Ayame suffer once more. (Source: Pocket Comics)

synopsis: After traveling into a historical BL novel, the actor Lin Yan gains a special ability: fast-traveling through a skill called [Escape Death]. His first mission? To secretly orchestrate an attack on Prince Qi Zhen, which leads to the prince becoming the villain. Lin Yan’s first identity in this world is none other than Lin Shou Yan, the prince’s foolish fiancé. But as he plays his role, he accidentally captures the prince’s heart, and his fake death turns out to be the key reason Qi Zhen becomes a ruthless tyrant! A cold, overthinking tsundere prince and his scheming, perverted fiancé—chaos ensues! (Source: KuiaKan Manhua, translated)

titleNative: 修羅幼女の英雄譚　～半端者と言われた傭兵、幼女に転生して成り上がる～
synonyms: The Heroic Tale of Shura Young Girl: A Mercenary Who was Said to be Half-Baked is Reincarnated as a Young Girl and Rises to Success
synopsis: "If I had a second life, wouldn't I be a ‘hero’ again?" Solfort Enuma is an old soldier who has spent more than 60 years training to become a 'hero'. He was an ordinary man with no talent, but he never gave up and continued to pursue his dream. One day, Solfort faced the 'hero' he had always longed for, but his sword failed to strike a blow and he met an unrewarding end... It was supposed to happen, but Solfort found himself reincarnated as a young girl...! Now her (his) heroic tale begins, as she (he) changes her name to Sol, to once again pursue the dream that did not come true in her previous life!

synopsis: Ferdinand, High Priest at the Temple of Ehrenfest, had three trusted confidants: knight Eckhart, scholar Justus, and attendant Lasfam. They gathered whenever occasion arose, bringing diverse information to share. What follows reveals their true selves—the stories unfolding behind the scenes of the main narrative. Reading this will make you love the world of "Honzuki" even more! This is the start of a series of exquisite bibliophile fantasy stories told from the perspectives of the three who swore loyalty to Ferdinand!! (Source: Corona EX, translated)

synopsis: After waking to find himself reincarnated and his past-life memories erased, Merlin is looking forward to a life of ease—but his reality is anything but easy! “Blessed” with god-tier stats and divine good looks, he quickly discovers that a normal life is next to impossible for someone who's constantly mistaken for a deity. It doesn't help that being OP means he can barely lift a finger without causing mass destruction! Then there's the issue of all the girls who desperately need his help. Too overpowered and too overrun with damsels in distress—will Merlin ever get to kick back and enjoy his new life? (Source: J-Novel Club)

synopsis: Princess Alice, who was turned back to her 10-year-old self with the "witch's power" before she died, meets Theodore, a heretic (Nox). He is the most hated and shunned member of the Knights' Order, but for a girl who was killed because of her crimson hair, he is the only person who can share her loneliness! However, contrary to the rumors (of the past), she is intelligent and gets caught up in a battle over the right to inherit the throne...? "Would you like to become a witch's knight out of self-interest?" "That's a ridiculous invitation, I don't think you're a princess, is it?" A relife story of a figurehead princess and a lonely knight who finally meet, both of whom have "crimson"! (Source: TO Books, translated)

synonyms: Zero Magician: I Was Supporting the S-Rank Hero Party with All My Might. The Strongest Magician Who Was Exiled Developed a Fear of Parties. I Decided to Put All My Effort into Making Each Person Unique.
synopsis: Rude, a magician belonging to an S-rank party, is expelled from the group due to the selfish actions of the hero, Tran. Betrayed by his comrades and heartbroken, Rude abandons the town he had been staying in and sets out on a journey to the neighboring Roland Empire in search of a new home. While on his journey, he defeats a band of thieves attacking a slave caravan. Then, unexpectedly, a beast girl who should have been freed pleads, “Please... I want you to be my master!”...? The strongest mage, abandoned by his comrades, becomes unstoppable in his new home! The Ultimate Heroic Fantasy! (Source: TO Books, translated)

One day, she had the same dream as usual, and then she was killed in a traffic accident. She found herself reincarnated as a young Letitia, before her execution. In order to avoid the terrible fate from her dreams, she tries to make a new life. First of all, she must find a way to avoid an engagement with the crown prince, who may be the one behind the plot....... (Source: Hifumishobo, translated)

synonyms: May Tomorrow Be Another Good Day: A new family was born in another world - Three brothers' heartwarming food diary
synopsis: Three brothers—Yuito, Haruto, and Yuuma—lost their mother in a traffic accident and were taken in by their father (who lived apart from her), spending their days enduring unreasonable violence. Just when they were on the verge of despair, given no proper meals and having no relatives to rely on—they were caught in a landslide and all three were reincarnated together into an isekai. A passing adventurer, Thomas, protected the three who had collapsed by the roadside, and together with his wife Olivia, who runs the eatery "Olive Tree," they welcomed the three as a "new family"... A warm isekai slow life spun by the beloved three brothers begins! (Source: Earth Star Entertainment, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Ashita mo Ii Hi de Arimasu you ni.: Isekai de Atarashii Kazoku ga Dekimashita—San Kyoudai no Hokkori Gohan Nikki

This is a story of love and desire between a divine beast and a human. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

synopsis: A deadly curse is slowly killing Teo, and none of the healers or magic users he's ever met have been able to help him - until one day, during his travels, he finds the natural spirit Arvahany. It might be much harder than either of them thought...

title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)

However, her younger sister Aria stole her fiancé and kicked her out of the house, returning her to a life of solitude. In order to attend Aria's engagement party and fight back, Leafe asks Oliver, the crown prince of a neighboring country, to be her partner. title: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleNative: 追放令嬢、クラフトしながらキャンピングカーで異世界を旅します
synonyms: The Exiled Lady Travels to Another World in a Camper Van While Crafting
synopsis: Riding in a camper, eating delicious food, and enjoying the spectacular view. Saori Furuki was a university student in the engineering department and loved making things. After a car accident, she is reborn as Eline, the daughter of a viscount, However, her family treats her coldly, saying that she is incompetent and can only use magic to produce items, and she is exiled from the country. However, Eline's “alchemy magic” is a magic that has unlimited possibilities when combined with the knowledge from her previous life! Determined to live freely from now on, Eline has created a camper for starters. She can move around, live, and make things as she pleases. Together with Aristy, a martial maid who adores Eline, she begins her adventurous journey with a sense of ease. Eating delicious food, admiring the spectacular scenery, and creating useful things. This is a travel story about riding in a camper and enjoying another world with elegance. (Source: SB Creative, translated)
